Unseen Strike - Passive: If the Sniper is Hidden when they make a successful standard attack against a target, they deal 1d10+4 physical damage instead of their standard damage.

entries.name: MERCHANT
entries.description:
Tier 1 Social
A finely dressed trader with a keen eye for financial gain.
Motives & Tactics: Buy low and sell high, create demand, inflate prices, avoid conflict

Difficulty: 12 | Thresholds: 4/8 | HP: 3 | Stress: 3
ATK: -1 | Club: Melee | 1d4+1 phy

Experience: Shrewd Negotiator +3

FEATURES
Preferential Treatment - Passive: A PC who succeeds on a Presence Roll made against the Merchant gains a discount of 25% on any purchase they make from them.
The Runaround - Passive: When a PC rolls a 14 or lower on a Presence Roll made against the Merchant, they must mark a Stress.

entries.name: MINOR CHAOS ELEMENTAL
entries.description:
Tier 1 Solo
A swirling mass of uncontrollable magic.
Motives & Tactics: Conflict, destabilize, transmagnify

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 7/14 | HP: 7 | Stress: 3
ATK: +2 | Warp Blast: Close | 1d12+6 mag

FEATURES
Arcane Form - Passive: The Elemental is resistant to magic damage.
Sickening Aura - Passive: When a PC Force attack within Close range to mark a Stress and become Vulnerable until their next rest or they clear 1 Stress.
Remake Reality - Action: Spend a Fear to transform the area within Very Close range into another terrain type or remove all cover.
Magical Reflection - Reaction: When the Elemental takes damage from any attack, Very Close range, add an amount of damage to the attack equal to half the damage they dealt.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Elemental makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: MINOR FIRE ELEMENTAL
entries.description:
Tier 1 Solo
A living flame the size of a large bonfire.
Motives & Tactics: Encircle enemies, grow in size, intimidate, set fires

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 7/15 | HP: 3 | Stress: 3
ATK: +3 | Elemental Blast: Far | 1d8+4 mag

FEATURES
Relentless (2) - Passive: The Elemental can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Scorched Earth - Action: Mark a Stress to blanket a Far range. The ground within Very Close range of the Elemental immediately bursts into flames. All creatures within this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d10 magic damage. The ground takes on fire and targets who succeed take half damage.
Explosion - Action: Spend a Fear to create a fiery explosion. Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against take 1d8 magic damage and are knocked back to Far range.
Consume Kindling - Reaction: Three times per scene, when the Elemental moves onto objects that can be easily flammable, consume them to clear a HP or a Stress.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Elemental makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: MINOR DEMON
entries.description:
Tier 1 Solo
A crimson-hued creature from the Circles Below, consumed by rage and malice.
Motives & Tactics: Act erratically, coral targets, relish pain, torment

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 8/15 | HP: 8 | Stress: 4
ATK: +3 | Claws: Melee | 1d8+6 phy

FEATURES
Relentless (2) - Passive: The Demon can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
All Must Fall - Passive: When a PC rolls with Fear, the Demon can move a Close range as a reaction.
Hellfire - Action: Spend a Fear to rain down hellfire within Far range. All targets within the area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 1d20+3 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
Fear of the Damned - Passive: When a PC marks for the Demon's attack, you can mark a Stress to gain a bonus to the damage roll equal to the Demon's current number of marked HP.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Demon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: MINOR TREANT
entries.description:
Tier 1 Minion
An ornamented sappling rising up to defend their forest.
Motives & Tactics: Crush, overwhelm, protect

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: -2 | Clawed Branch: Melee | 4 phy

FEATURES
Minion (5) - Passive: The Treant is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Treant, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Minor Treants within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: RED OOZE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Skulk
A moving mound of translucent fuming red slime.
Motives & Tactics: Camouflage, consume and multiply, ignite, start fires

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 6/11 | HP: 5 | Stress: 3
ATK: +1 | Ooze Appendage: Melee | 1d8+1 mag

Experience: Camouflage +4

FEATURES
Creeping Fire - Passive: The Ooze can only move with Very Close range as their normal movement. They light any flammable objects they pass through.
Ignite - Action: Make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target takes 1d8 magic damage and is Ignited until they're extinguished with a successful Finesse Roll (14). While Ignited, the target takes 1d4 magic damage when they take an action.
Split - Reaction: When the Ooze has 3 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Tiny Red Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.

entries.name: PIRATE CAPTAIN
entries.description:
Tier 1 Leader
A charismatic sea dog with an impressive hat, eager to raid and plunder.
Motives & Tactics: Command, make 'em walk the plank, plunder, raid

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 7/14 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +1 | Cutlass: Melee | 1d12+2 phy

Experience: Commander +2, Sailor +3

FEATURES
Swashbuckling - Passive: When the Captain marks 2 or fewer damage marked within Melee range, the attacker must mark a Stress.
Reinforcements - Action: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon a Pirate Raiders Horde, which appears at Far range.
No Quarter - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target who has taken damage within the current scene. The Captain's presence leads the Pirates in hurling threats and promises of a watery grave. The target must make a Presence Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target marks 1d4+1 Stress. On a success, they must mark 1 Stress.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Captain makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: SELLSWORD
entries.description:
Tier 1 Minion
An greed mercenary testing their luck.
Motives & Tactics: Charge, lacerate, overwhelm, profit

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +1 | Longsword: Melee | 3 phy

FEATURES
Minion (4) - Passive: The Sellsword is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Sellsword, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Sellswords within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 3 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: GREEN OOZE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Skulk
A molten mound of translucent green slime.
Motives & Tactics: Camouflage, consume and multiply, creep up, envelop

Difficulty: 8 | Thresholds: 5/10 | HP: 4 | Stress: 2
ATK: +1 | Ooze Appendage: Melee | 1d6+1 mag

Experience: Camouflage +3

FEATURES
Slow - Passive: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act on their next action. If a PC moves within Melee range of an Ooze, immediately spotlight the Ooze and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
Acid Form - Passive: When a creature makes an attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
Envelop - Action: Make a standard attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, in addition to damage, the target must mark 2 Stress. The target must mark an additional Stress when they make an action until the Ooze takes Severe damage, the target is freed.
Split - Reaction: When the Ooze has 3 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Tiny Green Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.

entries.name: TINY RED OOZE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Skulk
A small moving mound of translucent fuming red slime.
Motives & Tactics: Blaze, camouflage

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 5/None | HP: 2 | Stress: 1
ATK: -1 | Ooze Appendage: Melee | 1d4+2 mag

FEATURES
Burning - Reaction: When a creature within Melee range deals damage to the Ooze, they take 1d6 direct magic damage.

entries.name: PIRATE RAIDERS
entries.description:
Tier 1 Horde (3/HP)
Scallywags traveling together in a roving pack.
Motives & Tactics: Gang up, plunder, raid

Difficulty: 12 | Thresholds: 5/11 | HP: 4 | Stress: 3
ATK: +1 | Cutlass: Melee | 1d8+2 phy

Experience: Sailor +3

FEATURES
Raids (14d+1) - Passive: When the Raiders have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
Swashbuckler - Passive: When the Raiders mark 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark 1d4 Stress.

entries.name: SKELETON ARCHER
entries.description:
Tier 1 Ranged
A grinning skull armed with a shortbow and unlimited arrows.
Motives & Tactics: Perforate distracted targets, play dead, steal skin

Difficulty: 9 | Thresholds: 4/7 | HP: 3 | Stress: 2
ATK: +2 | Shortbow: Far | 1d8+1 phy

FEATURES
Opportunist - Passive: When two or more adversaries are within Very Close range of a creature, all damage the Archer deals to that creature is doubled.
Deadly Shot - Action: Make an attack against a Vulnerable target within Far range. On a success, mark a Stress to deal 1d4+1 additional damage.

entries.name: PETTY NOBLE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Social
A snooty member of laterred aristocrat brimming with hubris.
Motives & Tactics: Abuse power, gather resources, mobilize minions

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 6/10 | HP: 3 | Stress: 5
ATK: -1 | Rapier: Melee | 1d6+1 phy

Experience: Aristocrat +3

FEATURES
By Land, My Rules - Passive: All social actions made against the Noble on their land have disadvantage.
Guards, Save Them! - Action: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon 1d4 Bladed Guards, who appear at Far range to enforce the Noble's will.
Exile - Action: Spend a Fear and target a PC. The Noble proclaims that the target and their allies are exiled from the noble's territory. While exiled, the target and their allies have disadvantage during social situations within the Noble's domain.

entries.name: PIRATE TOUGH
entries.description:
Tier 1 Bruiser
An enthusiastical seasoned pirate with mean-sized fists.
Motives & Tactics: Plunder, raid, smash, terrorize

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 4/15 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: +1 | Massive Fists: Melee | 2d6 phy

Experience: Sailor +2

FEATURES
Swashbuckling - Passive: When the Tough marks 2 or fewer HP from an attack within Melee range, the attacker must mark 1 Stress.
Clear the Deck - Action: Make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. On a success, mark a Stress to move into Melee range of the target, dealing 2d4 physical damage and knocking the target back to Close range.

entries.name: SKELETON DREDGE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Minion
A clattering pile of bones.
Motives & Tactics: Fall apart, overwhelm, play dead, steal skin

Difficulty: 8 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: -1 | Bone Claws: Melee | 1 phy

FEATURES
Minion (4) - Passive: The Dredge is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Dredge, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Dredges within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 1 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: TINY GREEN OOZE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Skulk
A small moving mound of translucent green slime.
Motives & Tactics: Camouflage, creep up

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 4/None | HP: 2 | Stress: 1
ATK: -1 | Ooze Appendage: Melee | 1d4+1 mag

FEATURES
Acidic Form - Passive: When the Ooze makes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without receiving its benefits (they can still use armor to reduce the damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.

entries.name: SKELETON KNIGHT
entries.description:
Tier 1 Bruiser
A grim armored skeleton with a huge blade.
Motives & Tactics: Cut down the living, steal skin, wreak havoc

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 7/13 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: +2 | Rusty Greatsword: Melee | 1d10+2 phy

FEATURES
Terrifying - Passive: When the Knight makes a successful attack, all PCs within Close range to the attack mark 1d6+1 Stress.
Cut to the Bone - Action: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target in Close range. On a success, the Knight marks a Stress to deal 2d10+2 physical damage instead of Stress.
Dig Deep Graves - Reaction: When the Knight is defeated, they make an attack against a target within Very Close range (prioritize a creature who killed them). On a success, the target takes 1d8+3 physical damage and takes Severe Damage to their next action.

entries.name: SWARM OF RATS
entries.description:
Tier 1 Horde (10/HP)
A skittering mass of ordinary rodents moving as one like a ravenous wave.
Motives & Tactics: Consume, obscure, swarm

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 6/10 | HP: 6 | Stress: 2
ATK: -3 | Claws: Melee | 1d8+2 phy

FEATURES
Horde (14d+1) - Passive: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
In Your Face - Passive: All targets within Melee range have disadvantage on attacks against targets other than the Swarm.

entries.name: TANGLE BRAMBLE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Minion
An animated, blood-drinking tumbleweed.
Motives & Tactics: Combine, drain, entangle

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: -1 | Thorns: Melee | 2 phy

FEATURES
Minion (4) - Passive: The Bramble is defeated when they take any damage. For every 4 damage a PC deals to the Bramble, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Tangle Brambles within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.
Drain and Multiply - Reaction: When an attack from the Bramble causes a target to mark HP and there are three or more Tangle Brambles within the GM's sight, you can spend a Fear to grow the Minions into a Tangle Bramble Swarm Horde. The Horde's HP is equal to the number of Minions consumed.

entries.name: BRAWNY ZOMBIE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Bruiser
A large corpse, decay-bloated and angry.
Motives & Tactics: Crush, destroy, hail debris, slam

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 3/15 | HP: 7 | Stress: 4
ATK: +2 | Slam: Very Close | 1d12+3 phy

Experience: Collateral Damage +2, Throw +4

FEATURES
Slow - Passive: When you spotlight the Zombie and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When they do act, they can act twice on that action if that token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
Rend Asunder - Action: Make a standard attack with advantage against a target the Zombie has Restrained. On a success, the attacker deals direct damage.
Rip and Tear - Reaction: When the Zombie makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to move the target into Very Close range and they're Restrained.

entries.name: SKELETON WARRIOR
entries.description:
Tier 1 Standard
A dirt-covered skeleton armed with a rusted blade.
Motives & Tactics: Fray action, gang up on, steal skin

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 4/8 | HP: 3 | Stress: 2
ATK: +1 | Rusted Sword: Melee | 1d8+1 phy

FEATURES
Only Bones - Passive: The Warrior is resistant to physical damage.
Won't Stay Dead - Reaction: When the Warrior is defeated, you can spotlight them and roll a d6. On a result of 6, if there are other adversaries on the battlefield, the Warrior re-forms with no marked HP.

entries.name: SYLVAN SOLDIER
entries.description:
Tier 1 Standard
A fierce warrior adorned in armor made of leaves and bark.
Motives & Tactics: Ambush, hide, overwhelm, protect, trail

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 6/11 | HP: 4 | Stress: 2
ATK: +0 | Scythe: Melee | 1d8+1 phy

Experience: Tracker +2

FEATURES
Trek Forest - Passive: If the Soldier makes a standard attack, and another Sylvan Soldier is within Melee range of the target, deal 1d8+5 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
Forest Control - Action: Spend a Fear to put down a tree within Close range. A creature hit by the tree must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 2d6 direct physical damage.
Blend In - Reaction: When the Soldier makes a successful attack, you can mark a Stress to become Hidden until the Soldier's next attack or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll (14) to find them.

entries.name: WEAPONMASTER
entries.description:
Tier 1 Bruiser
A master duelist wielding a sword lance their size.
Motives & Tactics: Act first, aim for the weakest, intimidate

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 8/15 | HP: 5 | Stress: 3
ATK: +2 | Claymore: Very Close | 1d12+2 phy

FEATURES
Goading Strike - Action: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, mark a Stress to have the target until their next successful attack. The next time the Taunted target attacks, they must mark a Stress or get 1d4+1 additional damage on their next attack.
Adrenaline Burst - Action: Once per scene, spend a Fear to clear 2 HP of Stress.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Weaponmaster makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: PATCHWORK ZOMBIE HULK
entries.description:
Tier 1 Solo
A towering gestalt of corpses moving as one, with torso-sized limbs and fists to large as a grown halfling.
Motives & Tactics: Absorb, corpses, flail, hunger, terrify

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 3/15 | HP: 10 | Stress: 4
ATK: +4 | Too Many Arms: Very Close | 1d20 phy

Experience: Intimidation +2, Tear Things Apart +2

FEATURES
Destructible - Passive: When the Zombie takes Major or greater damage, they mark an additional HP.
Flailing Limbs - Passive: When the Zombie makes a standard attack, they target all PCs within Very Close range.
Another for the Pile - Action: When the Zombie is within Very Close range of a corpse, they can incorporate it into themselves, clearing a HP and a Stress.
Tormented Screams - Action: Mark a Stress to cause all PCs within Very Close range to succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll (11). Targets who fail lose a Hope and you gain a Fear for each. Target who succeeds must mark a Stress.

entries.name: SPELLBLADE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Leader
A gleaming warrior wielding steel and magic to deadly effect.
Motives & Tactics: Blast, command, endure

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 8/14 | HP: 6 | Stress: 3
ATK: +1 | Empowered Longsword: Melee | 1d8+3 mag

Experience: Magical Knowledge +2

FEATURES
Arcane Steel - Passive: Damage dealt by the Spellblade's standard attack is considered both physical and magic.
Support the Unit - Action: Mark a Stress to target a group within Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or take 1d8+2 physical damage from a magical barrier who marked HP from this attack.
Move as a Unit - Action: Spend a Fear to spotlight up to five allies within Close range. All allies can immediately move up to Far range.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Spellblade makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: TANGLE BRAMBLE SWARM
entries.description:
Tier 1 Horde (3/HP)
A cluster of animated, blood-drinking tumbleweeds, each the size of a wine gourd.
Motives & Tactics: Digest, entangle, immobilize

Difficulty: 12 | Thresholds: 6/11 | HP: 6 | Stress: 3
ATK: +0 | Thorns: Melee | 1d6+3 phy

Experience: Camouflage +2

FEATURES
Horde (1d4+2) - Passive: When the Swarm has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
Crush - Action: Mark a Stress to deal 2d6+8 direct physical damage to a target with 3 or more bramble tokens.
Encumber - Reaction: When the Swarm succeeds on an attack, give the target a bramble token. If a target has any bramble tokens, they are Restrained. For every three bramble tokens, they are also Vulnerable. All bramble tokens can be removed by succeeding on a Finesse Roll (12 + the number of bramble tokens) or dealing Major or greater damage to the Swarm. If bramble tokens are removed from a target using a standard attack, the attacker takes 1d4 magic damage per token within Melee range equal to the number of tokens removed.

entries.name: YOUNG DRYAD
entries.description:
Tier 1 Leader
A beautiful fey with flowing tree forest's defenses.
Motives & Tactics: Command, nurture, prune the unwelcome

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 6/11 | HP: 6 | Stress: 2
ATK: +0 | Scythe: Melee | 1d8+5 phy

Experience: Leadership +3

FEATURES
Voice of the Forest - Action: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies within Close range to move to Melee range. On a success, mark a Stress to cause the target to lose 1d6 Hope.
Thorny Cage - Action: Spend a Fear to form a cage around a target within Very Close range and Restrain them until they're freed with a successful Strength Roll. When a creature makes an action roll against the cage, they must mark a Stress.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Dryad makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: ROTTED ZOMBIE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Minion
A decaying corpse ambling toward their prey.
Motives & Tactics: Eat flesh, hunger, maul, surround

Difficulty: 8 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: -3 | Bite: Melee | 2 phy

FEATURES
Minion (3) - Passive: The Zombie is defeated when they take any damage. For every 3 damage a PC deals to the Zombie, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Rotted Zombies within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 2 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: SHAMBLING ZOMBIE
entries.description:
Tier 1 Standard
An animated corpse that moves shakily, driven only by hunger.
Motives & Tactics: Devour, hungry, mob enemy, shred flesh

Difficulty: 10 | Thresholds: 4/6 | HP: 5 | Stress: 3
ATK: +0 | Bite: Melee | 1d6+1 phy

FEATURES
Too Many to Handle - Passive: When the Zombie is within Melee range of a target and all attack on the Zombie's turn, all attacks against that creature have advantage.
Horrifying - Passive: Targets who mark HP from the Zombie's attack must make a Presence Reaction Roll or mark 1 Stress.

entries.name: ZOMBIE PACK
entries.description:
Tier 1 Horde (2/HP)
A group of shambling corpses instinctively moving together.
Motives & Tactics: Consume flesh, hunger, maul

Difficulty: 8 | Thresholds: 6/12 | HP: 8 | Stress: 4
ATK: -1 | Bite: Melee | 1d10+2 phy

FEATURES
Horde (1d4+2) - Passive: When the Zombies have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+1 physical damage instead.
Overwhelm - Reaction: When the Zombies mark HP from an attack on their attacker, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.

entries.name: BATTLE BOX
entries.description:
Tier 2 Solo
A cube-shaped construct with a different rune on each of their six sides.
Motives & Tactics: Charge tactics, trample foes, wait in disguise

Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 10/20 | HP: 5 | Stress: 6
ATK: +2 | Slam: Melee | 2d6+3 phy

Experience: Camouflage +2

FEATURES
Relentless (2) - Passive: The Box can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Randomized Tactics - Action: Mark a Stress and roll a d6. The Box uses the corresponding move:
1. Mana Burn. The Box fires a searing beam. Make an attack against a target within Far range. On a success, deal 2d10+2 magic damage.
2. Fire Jets. The Box shoots into the air, spinning and releasing jets of flames. Make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against take 2d8 physical damage.
3. Shield Bash. The Box charges forward. Make an attack against all PCs within Close range. Targets the Box succeeds against are moved to Very Close range and knocked until their next action without Hope.
4. Shocking Grasp. The Box sprays out a silver gas sparking with electricity. All targets within Very Close range must succeed on a Finesse Reaction Roll or mark 3 Stress.
5. Stunning Stomp. The Box hops and slams down, creating a small sonic boom. All targets within Very Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or fall to the ground and lose an action on their next turn.
6. Psychic Whine. The Box releases a cluster of mechanical bees whose buzz assaults mental mindset. All targets within Close range must succeed on a Presence Reaction Roll or take 1d8 direct magic damage.

entries.name: CONSCRIPT
entries.description:
Tier 2 Minion
A poorly trained civilian pressed into war.
Motives & Tactics: Follow orders, gang up, survive

Difficulty: 12 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +0 | Spear: Very Close | 6 phy

FEATURES
Minion (6) - Passive: The Conscript is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Conscript, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Conscripts within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 6 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: ARCHER SQUADRON
entries.description:
Tier 2 Horde (4/HP)
A group of elite fighters sharing arrows.
Motives & Tactics: Stick together, survive, volley fire

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 8/16 | HP: 4 | Stress: 3
ATK: +0 | Longbow: Far | 2d6+3 phy

FEATURES
Horde (1d6+3) - Passive: When the Squadron has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+3 physical damage instead.
Focused Fire - Action: Spend a Fear to target a point within Far range. Make an attack with advantage against all targets within Close range of that point. All creatures that take damage are Vulnerable until their next action.
Suppressing Fire - Action: Mark a Stress to target a point within Far range. Fire next roll with Fear; a creature who moves more than Close range around that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 2d6+1 physical damage. On a success, they take half damage.

entries.name: ASSASSIN POISONER
entries.description:
Tier 2 Skulk
A cowering cloaked skilled in both poisons and ambushing.
Motives & Tactics: Anticipate, get paid, kill, send foul water

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 4/16 | HP: 3 | Stress: 4
ATK: +1 | Poisoned Throwing Dagger: Close | 2d8+1 phy

Experience: Intrusion +2

FEATURES
Grindletooth Venom - Passive: Targets who mark HP from the Assassin's attacks are Vulnerable until they clear a HP.
Out of Nowhere - Passive: The Assassin has advantage on attacks made against Hidden.
Fumigation - Action: Drop a smoke bomb that fills the air within Close range with smoke. Dazzling all targets in this area. Dazzled targets have disadvantage on their next action roll, then clear the condition.

entries.name: COURTESAN
entries.description:
Tier 2 Social
An accomplished manipulator and master of the social arts.
Motives & Tactics: Entice, maneuver, secure patrons

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 7/13 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: -1 | Dagger: Melee | 1d4+3 phy

Experience: Manipulation +3, Socialite +2

FEATURES
Seduction - Reaction: When a PC makes a successful Presence Reaction Roll, you can mark a Stress to cast a gaze toward the aftermath. On the target's failure, they are Charmed and all Courtesans are Vulnerable until the scene ends or they succeed on a social action against the Courtesan. On the target's success, they must mark a Stress.

entries.name: APPRENTICE ASSASSIN
entries.description:
Tier 2 Minion
A young trainee eager to prove themselves.
Motives & Tactics: Ruthless, kill quietly, prove their worth, show off

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: -1 | Thrown Dagger: Very Close | 4 phy

Experience: Intrusion +2

FEATURES
Minion (6) - Passive: The Assassin is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Assassin, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear and choose a target and spotlight all Apprentice Assassins within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 4 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: MASTER ASSASSIN
entries.description:
Tier 2 Leader
A seasoned killer with a threatening voice and a deadly blade.
Motives & Tactics: Ambush, get out alive, kill precisely, work alone for all scenarios

Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 12/25 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +5 | Serrated Dagger: Close | 2d10+2 phy

Experience: Command +3, Intrusion +3

FEATURES
Won't See It Coming - Passive: The Assassin deals direct damage while they're Hidden.
Strike as One - Action: Mark a Stress to spotlight a number of allies equal to the number of PCs within Far range.
The Subtle Blade - Reaction: When the Assassin successfully makes a standard attack against a Vulnerable creature, you can spend a Fear to deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Assassin makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: CHAOS SKULL
entries.description:
Tier 2 Solo
A skull-faced creature tormented by scintillating magic.
Motives & Tactics: Cackle, consume magic, serve creator

Difficulty: 16 | Thresholds: 4/16 | HP: 5 | Stress: 6
ATK: +2 | Energy Blast: Close | 2d8+3 mag

FEATURES
Levitation - Passive: The Skull levitates several feet off the ground and can fly to difficult terrain.
Wards - Passive: The Skull is resistant to magic damage.
Magic Burst - Action: Mark a Stress to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Skull succeeds against take 2d6+4 magic damage.
Siphon Magic - Action: Spend a Fear to make an attack against a PC with a Spellcast trait within Very Close range. On a success, the target marks 1d4 Stress and the Skull clears that many Stress. Additionally, on a success, the Skull can immediately be spotlighted again.

entries.name: CULT ADEPT
entries.description:
Tier 2 Support
An experienced mage wielding shadow and fear.
Motives & Tactics: Curry favor, hinder foes, uncover ancient knowledge

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 9/18 | HP: 4 | Stress: 6
ATK: +2 | Rune-Covered Rod: Far | 2d6+3 mag

Experience: Fallen Lore +2, Rituals +2

FEATURES
Enervating Blast - Action: Spend a Fear to make a standard attack against a target within range. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
Shroud of the Fallen - Action: Mark a Stress to wrap an ally within Close range with protective Darkness. While Protected, the target has resistance to all damage.
Shadow Shackles - Action: Spend a Fear to target all PCs within Far range. All targets must succeed on Finesse Reaction Roll or be Restrained in smoky chains until they break free or the Adept is defeated. Additionally, each Restrained PC is consumed by the darkness and must spend a Hope to make an action roll.
Fear Is Fuel - Reaction: Twice per scene, when an adversary spends Fear with Fear, clear a Stress.

entries.name: CULT FANG
entries.description:
Tier 2 Skulk
A professional knife-turned-cultist.
Motives & Tactics: Capture sacrifices, isolate prey, rise in the ranks

Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 9/17 | HP: 4 | Stress: 4
ATK: +1 | Fang Ritual: Melee | 1d6+3 phy

FEATURES
Shadow Defense - Passive: The Fang can climb and walk on vertical surfaces. Mark a Stress to move from one shadow to another within Far range, making them temporarily Vulnerable. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.
Pick Off the Straggler - Action: Target a creature alone within Melee range to make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, the target takes 2d6+2 Stress and the attacker must mark a Stress. On a success, the target must mark a Stress.

entries.name: ELECTRIC EELS
entries.description:
Tier 2 Horde (2/HP)
A swarm of eels that electrify and electrocute.
Motives & Tactics: Avoid larger predators, shock prey, tear apart

Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: 10/20 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: +0 | Shocking Bite: Melee | 2d6+4 phy

FEATURES
Horde (2d4+1) - Passive: When the Eels have marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 1d4+4 physical damage instead.
Paralyzing Shock - Action: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack on two separate targets within Very Close range. Deal 1 HP for each target that marks HP.

entries.name: GIANT BEASTMASTER
entries.description:
Tier 2 Leader
A hulking orc warrior bearing a whip and massive bow.
Motives & Tactics: Command, make a living, maneuver, pin down, protect creatures

Difficulty: 16 | Thresholds: 12/24 | HP: 5 | Stress: 5
ATK: +2 | Longbow: Far | 2d8+4 phy

Experience: Animal Handling +3

FEATURES
Two as One - Passive: When the Beastmaster is spotlighted, you can also spotlight a Tier 1 animal adversary currently under their control.
Pinning Strike - Action: Make a standard attack against a target. On a success, you can mark a Stress to pin them to a nearby surface. The pinned target is Restrained until they break free with a successful Finesse or Strength Roll.
Deadly Command - Action: Mark a Stress to order a Dire Wolf, or similar Tier 1 animal adversary under the Beast Master's control. The adversary appears at Close range and is immediately spotlighted.

entries.name: GIANT RECRUIT
entries.description:
Tier 2 Minion
A giant fighter wearing borrowed armor.
Motives & Tactics: Batter, make a living, overwhelm, terrify

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +1 | Warhammer: Very Close | 5 phy

FEATURES
Minion (7) - Passive: The Recruit is defeated when they take any damage. For every 7 damage a PC deals to the Recruit, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Giant Recruits within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: CULT INITIATE
entries.description:
Tier 2 Minion
A desperate person taking on simple robes, eager to gain power.
Motives & Tactics: Follow orders, gain power, seek forbidden knowledge

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +0 | Ritual Dagger: Melee | 3 phy

FEATURES
Minion (5) - Passive: The Initiate is defeated when they take any damage. For every 5 damage a PC deals to the Initiate, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Cult Initiates within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 3 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: ELITE SOLDIER
entries.description:
Tier 2 Standard
An armored squire or battle-experienced commoner looking to advance.
Motives & Tactics: Gain glory, keep order, make alliances

Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 9/18 | HP: 4 | Stress: 4
ATK: +1 | Spear: Very Close | 2d8+4 phy

FEATURES
Reinforce - Action: Mark a Stress to move into Melee range of an ally and make a standard attack against a target within Very Close range, deal 2d10+2 physical damage and clear a Stress.
Vassal's Loyalty - Reaction: When the Soldier rolls within Very Close range of a knight or other noble who would take damage, you can mark a Stress to move into Melee range and reduce the damage instead.

entries.name: GIANT BRAWLER
entries.description:
Tier 2 Bruiser
An impressively large giant wielding a warhammer larger than a human.
Motives & Tactics: Make a living, overwhelm, slam, topple

Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 14/28 | HP: 7 | Stress: 4
ATK: +2 | Warhammer: Very Close | 2d12+5 phy

Experience: Intrusion +2

FEATURES
Battering Ram - Action: Mark a Stress to have the Brawler charge at an immovable object. The object takes 2d12 direct damage and any creature within Very Close range of the object who succeeded on an Agility Reaction Roll takes 1d4 physical damage from the shrapnel.
Bloody Struggle - Reaction: When the Brawler marks 2 or more HP on their turn, they can make a standard attack against the attacker. On a success, the Brawler deals 2d6+1 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Brawler makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: DEMONIC HOUND PACK
entries.description:
Tier 2 Horde (1/HP)
A trio of demonic canines unified by hellfire.
Motives & Tactics: Cause fear, consume flesh, please masters

Difficulty: 11 | Thresholds: 11/23 | HP: 6 | Stress: 3
ATK: +0 | Claws and Fangs: Melee | 2d8+2 phy

Experience: Scent Tracking +3

FEATURES
Horde (1d8+2) - Passive: When the Pack has marked half or more of their HP, their standard attack deals 2d4+1 physical damage instead.
Dreadhowl - Action: Mark a Stress to make all targets within Very Close range lose a Hope. If a target is not able to lose a Hope, they must mark 2 Stress instead.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Pack makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: FAILED EXPERIMENT
entries.description:
Tier 2 Standard
A magical abomination experiment gone wrong, housing them in a wretched monstrosity.
Motives & Tactics: Devour, hurt, track

Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 12/23 | HP: 4 | Stress: 3
ATK: +1 | Bite and Claw: Melee | 2d6+5 phy

Experience: Cogcast +3

FEATURES
Warped Fortitude - Passive: The Experiment is resistant to physical damage.
Overwhelm - Passive: When a target the Experiment attacks has other adversaries within Very Close range, the Experiment deals double damage.
Seething Fangs - Action: Mark a Stress to spotlight the Experiment to an additional GM move instead of spending Fear.

entries.name: STONEWRAITH
entries.description:
Tier 2 Skulk
A primordial creature, like a stalking mountain lion, with a slate-grey stone body.
Motives & Tactics: Defend territory, isolate prey, stalk
Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: 11/22 | HP: 5 | Stress: 3
ATK: +3 | Bite and Claws: Melee | 2d8+6 phy
Experience: Stonemere +3

FEATURES
Stonestrider - Passive: The Stonewraith can move through stone and earth as easily as air. While within stone or earth, they are Invisible and have advantage on attack rolls.
Rocky Ambush - Action: While Hidden, mark a Stress to leap into Melee range with a target within Very Close range. The target must succeed on an Agility or Instinct Reaction Roll (15) or take 2d8 direct physical damage and become Restrained.
Avalanche - Action: Once per scene, mark 2 Stress to create an avalanche. All targets within Close range must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll (14) or take 2d10 physical damage. The rubble can be cleared with a Progress Countdown (5).
Momentum - Reaction: When the Stonewraith makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: TIER 3 ADVERSARIES (LEVELS 5-7)
entries.description: TIER 3 ADVERSARIES (LEVELS 5-7)

entries.name: ADULT FLICKERFLY
entries.description:
Tier 3 Solo
A winged insect the size of a large house with iridescent scales and wings that move too fast to track.
Motives & Tactics: Quick, shiny things, hunt, swoop
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 20/35 | HP: 12 | Stress: 6
ATK: +3 | Wing Slash: Very Close | 3d20 phy

FEATURES
Relentless (4) - Passive: The Flickerfly can be spotlighted up to four times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Fly By Attack - Action: Before the Flickerfly makes an attack, move target's Evasion is halved against the attack.
Deadly Flight - Passive: While flying, the Flickerfly can move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
Whirlwind - Action: Spend a Fear to move up to whirl, making an attack against all targets within Very Close range. If the Flickerfly succeeds against two 3d8 direct physical damage.
Mind Dance - Action: Mark a Stress to create a magically dazzling display that grapples the minds of nearby foes. All targets within Close range must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. For each target who fails their roll, their next action is a Standard Move toward the Flickerfly instead of using their action to move away from their fears.
Hallucinatory Breath - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 1d6). When the Flickerfly takes damage for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, the Flickerfly breathes hallucinatory gas on all targets in front of them up to Far range. Targets must make an Instinct Reaction Roll or be tormented by fearful hallucinations. Targets whose fears are known to the GM must make an additional Reaction Roll. Targets who fail lose 2 Hope and take 3d8+3 direct magic damage.
Uncanny Reflexes - Reaction: When the Flickerfly takes a reaction from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to take half damage.

entries.name: DEMON OF AVARICE
entries.description:
Tier 3 Support
A corpulent creature constantly adorned with crass colored silk and treasure.
Motives & Tactics: Consume, fuel greed, sow dissent
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 15/29 | HP: 6 | Stress: 5
ATK: +2 | Hungry Maw: Melee | 3d6+1 phy
Experience: Manipulation +3

FEATURES
Money Talks - Passive: Attacks against the Demon are made with disadvantage unless the attacker spends a handful of gold. This Demon starts with a number of handfuls equal to the number of PCs. When a target marks HP from the Demon's standard attack, add a handful of gold to the Demon (GM's choice: 1 handful per HP). Add a handful of gold to the Demon for each handful of gold spent by PCs on this feature.
Numbers Must Go Up - Passive: Add a bonus to the Demon's attack rolls equal to 8 number of handfuls of gold they have.
Money is Time - Action: Spend 3 handfuls of gold (or a Fear) to spotlight 1d4+1 allies.

entries.name: DEMON OF DESPAIR
entries.description:
Tier 3 Skulk
A shadow-demon-creature with long limbs, seeping shadows, and unsettling stance.
Motives & Tactics: Make fear contagious, stick to the shadows, undermine resolve
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 18/35 | HP: 6 | Stress: 5
ATK: +5 | Miasma Bolt: Far | 3d6+1 mag
Experience: Manipulation +3

FEATURES
Depths of Despair - Passive: The Demon deals double damage to PCs with 0 Hope.
Your Struggle is Pointless - Action: Spend a Fear to weigh down the spirits of all PCs within Far range. All targets affected by this take a -2 penalty to all rolls until the end of their next rest.
Your Friends Will Fall You - Reaction: When a PC falls with Fear, you can mark a Stress to cause all other PCs within Close range to lose a Hope.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Demon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: DEMON OF HUBRIS
entries.description:
Tier 3 Leader
A perfect, beautiful and infinitely cruel demon with a gleaming golden crown.
Motives & Tactics: Condescend, declare premature victory, prove superiority
Difficulty: 18 | Thresholds: 18/36 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +4 | Perfect Spear: Very Close | 3d10 phy
Experience: Manipulation +2

FEATURES
Terrifying - Passive: When the Demon makes a successful attack, the target gains a Fear.
Double or Nothing - Passive: When a PC within Far range fails a roll, double all damage from the Demon's attacks against the new result. If they still fail, they mark 2 Stress and the Demon clears all Stress.
Unyielding - Action: The Demon recovers their spent reactions. Standard attack damage to a target within Close range.
The Root of Your Pride - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 2). When another Demons within Far range.
You Rule in Comparison - Reaction: When a PC fails a roll within Close range of the Demon, they must mark a Stress.

entries.name: DEMON OF JEALOUSY
entries.description:
Tier 3 Ranged
A fickle creature of spindly limbs and insatiable desires.
Motives & Tactics: Join in on others' success, take what belongs to others, hold grudges
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 17/30 | HP: 6 | Stress: 6
ATK: +4 | Psychic Assault: Far | 3d8+1 mag
Experience: Manipulation +3

FEATURES
Unprotected Mind - Passive: The Demon's standard attack deals direct damage.
My Turn - Reaction: When the Demon marks HP from an attack, spend a number of Fear equal to the damage taken to immediately take the same action the attacker just took.
Rivalry - Reaction: When a creature within Close range takes damage from a different adversary, you can mark a Stress to make an attack against that creature.
What's Yours is Mine - Reaction: When a PC takes Severe damage within Very Close range of the Demon, you can mark a Stress to cause the target to make a Finesse Reaction Roll. On a failure, the Demon seizes one item or consumable they find in the Close range from the target's inventory.

entries.name: DEMON OF WRATH
entries.description:
Tier 3 Bruster
A towering demon with boulder-sized fists, driven by endless rage.
Motives & Tactics: Fuel anger, impress rivals, wreak havoc
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 22/40 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +5 | Fists: Very Close | 3d8+1 mag
Experience: Intimidation +2

FEATURES
Anger Unrelenting - Passive: The Demon's attacks deal direct damage.
Battle Lust - Action: Spend a Fear to boil the blood of all PCs within Far range. They use a +20 as their Fear total instead of their current total as long as they remain in the scene.
Retaliation - Reaction: When the Demon takes damage from an attack within Close range, you can mark a Stress to make a standard attack against the attacker.
Blood and Souls - Reaction: Countdown (Loop 4). The first time an attack is made within sight of the Demon, it ticks down when a PC takes a violent action. Mark 2 Stress to summon a Minor Demon, who appears at Close range.

entries.name: DIRE BAT
entries.description:
Tier 3 Skulk
A wolf-sized bat endlessly loyal to their vampire owner.
Motives & Tactics: Divebomb, hide, protect leader
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 18/30 | HP: 5 | Stress: 5
ATK: +2 | Claws and Teeth: Melee | 2d6+7 phy
Experience: Bloodhound +3

FEATURES
Flying - Passive: While flying, the Bat gains a +3 bonus to their Difficulty.
Screech - Action: Mark a Stress to send a high-pitch screech out toward all targets in front of the Bat within Far range. Those targets must make an Instinct Reaction Roll (16) or gain a Fear.
Guardian Strike - Action: If an ally within range marks a +2 Stress to send it flying into Melee range of the attacker and make an attack with advantage against them, dealing an additional 2d6+2 physical damage.

entries.name: DRYAD
entries.description:
Tier 3 Leader
Ancient spirit in the form of a humanoid tree.
Motives & Tactics: Commune, cultivate, drive out, preserve the forest
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 24/38 | HP: 5 | Stress: 5
ATK: +4 | Deadfall Shortbow: Far | 3d10+1 phy
Experience: Forest Knowledge +4

FEATURES
Bramble Patch - Action: Mark a Stress to create a joint attack at Far range. Create a patch of thorns that covers an area within Close range of the targeted point. Targets within the area take 2d6+2 physical damage when they act. A target must succeed on a Finesse or Strength Reaction Roll (15) to leave the area once they enter it.
Grow Saplings - Action: Spend a Fear to grow three Treant Sapling Minions at any point within Close range of a tree anywhere in the spotlight.
We Are One - Reaction: When an ally dies within Close range, you can spend a Fear to clear 2 HP from yourself. The ally's life force is returned to the forest.

entries.name: ELEMENTAL SPARK
entries.description:
Tier 3 Minion
A blazing mote of elemental fire.
Motives & Tactics: Blast, consume, gain mass
Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +0 | Bursts of Fire: Close | 5 mag

FEATURES
Minion (9) - Passive: The Elemental is defeated when they take any damage. For every 9 damage a PC deals to the Elemental, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would have affected against.
Group Immolation: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Elemental Sparks within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 5 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: GREATER EARTH ELEMENTAL
entries.description:
Tier 3 Bruster
A living landslide of boulders and dust, as large as a house.
Motives & Tactics: Avalanche, knock over, pummel
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 22/40 | HP: 8 | Stress: 4
ATK: +7 | Boulder Fist: Very Close | 3d10+1 phy

FEATURES
Slow - Passive: When you spotlight the Elemental and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Elemental next turn, they act (remove the token when they do so).
Crushing Blows - Passive: When the Elemental makes a successful attack, the target must make an Armor Slot without recovering its benefits (if they can still use armor to reduce damage). If they can't mark an Armor Slot, they must mark an additional HP.
Immovable Object - Passive: As attack rolls made against the Elemental move them two fewer ranges (example, Far becomes Very Close). When the Elemental takes physical damage, reduce it by 3.
Rockslide - Action: Mark a Stress to create a rockslide that buries the land in front of Elemental within Close range in difficult terrain. All targets in this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll (15). Targets who fail take 2d12+5 physical damage and become Restrained until they succeed on a Strength roll with Hope. Targets who succeed take half damage.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Elemental makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: GREATER WATER ELEMENTAL
entries.description:
Tier 3 Support
A huge living wave that crashes down upon enemies.
Motives & Tactics: Deluge, disperse, drown
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 17/34 | HP: 6 | Stress: 5
ATK: +4 | Crashing Wave: Very Close | 3d4+1 mag

FEATURES
Water Jet - Action: Mark a Stress to attack a target within Very Close range. On a success, deal 2d6+4 physical damage to the target. If the target has disadvantage. On a failure, the target must mark a Stress.
Drowning Embrace - Action: Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Elemental succeeds against become Restrained and Vulnerable, which lasts for both conditions, with a successful Strength or Instinct Roll.
High Tide - Reaction: When the Elemental makes a successful standard attack, you can mark a Stress to knock the target back to Close range.

entries.name: HUGE GREEN OOZE
entries.description:
Tier 3 Skulk
A translucent green mound of acid taller than most humans.
Motives & Tactics: Camouflage, creep up, envelop, multiply
Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 15/30 | HP: 7 | Stress: 4
ATK: +1 | Ooze Appendage: Melee | 3d8+1 mag
Experience: Bruiser +3

FEATURES
Slow Poison - Passive: When you spotlight the Ooze and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't act yet. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight them again and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can act.
Acidic Form - Passive: When the Ooze takes a successful attack, the target must mark an Armor Slot without reducing its benefits. If the target has no more available Armor Slots, if they take physical damage again, their armor breaks and they gain 1d4 HP.
Envelop - Action: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, the target is Enveloped and you and they must mark 2 Stress. While Enveloped, the target must mark an additional Stress each time they make an action roll. The target may take an action with Hope to attempt to break free. When they roll with Hope, all Enveloped targets are freed and the condition is cleared.
Split - Reaction: When the Ooze has 4 or more HP marked, you can spend a Fear to split them into two Green Oozes (with no marked HP or Stress). Immediately spotlight both of them.

entries.name: HYDRA
entries.description:
Tier 3 Solo
A massive, serpentine beast with multiple long-necked heads, each filled with menacing fangs.
Motives & Tactics: Destroy, regenerate, terrify
Difficulty: 18 | Thresholds: 19/35 | HP: 10 | Stress: 5
ATK: +2 | Bramble: Close | 4d12+4 phy
Experience: Bruiser +3

FEATURES
Many-Headed Menace - Passive: The Hydra begins with three heads and can have up to five. When the Hydra takes Major or greater damage, they lose a head.
Relentless (X) - Passive: The Hydra can be spotlighted X times per GM turn, where X is the Hydra's number of heads. Spend Fear as usual.
Regeneration - Action: If the Hydra has any marked HP, spend a Fear to clear Stress equal to their heads.
Terrifying Chorus - Action: All PCs within Far range lose 2 Hope.
Magical Weakness - Reaction: When the Hydra takes magical damage, they lose a head and are Dazed. While Dazed, they can't use their Regeneration action but are immune to magic damage.

entries.name: MONARCH
entries.description:
Tier 3 Social
The sovereign ruler of a nation, wreathed in the privilege of tradition and wielding unmatched power in their domain.
Motives & Tactics: Control vassals, destroy rivals, forge a legacy
Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: 16/32 | HP: 6 | Stress: 5
ATK: +0 | Warhammer: Melee | 3d8+3 phy
Experience: History +3, Nobility +4

FEATURES
Execute Them - Action: Spend a Fear per PC in the party to have the group condemned for crimes real or imagined. A PC who attempts to avoid their fate will demand trial by combat or another special form of trial.
Crownguard - Action: Once per scene, mark a Stress to summon six Tier 3 Minions, who appear at Close range to enforce the Monarch's will.
Cause for War - Reaction: Once a scene, spend 144 Fear to go waractive after the Monarch's desire for war is first revealed. When it triggers, the Monarch has a reason to rally the nation to war and the support to act on that reason. You gain 144 Fear.

entries.name: STAG KNIGHT
entries.description:
Tier 3 Standard
A knight with huge, majestic antlers wearing armor made of dangerous thorns.
Motives & Tactics: Isolate, maneuver, protect the forest, weed out weakness
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 19/36 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +3 | Bramble Sword: Melee | 3d8+3 phy
Experience: Forest Knowledge +3

FEATURES
From Above - Passive: When the Knight succeeds on a standard attack against a target, they deal 3d12+3 physical damage instead of their standard damage.
Blade of the Forest - Action: Spend a Fear to make an attack against all targets within Very Close range. Targets the Knight succeeds against take physical damage equal to 3d4 + the Knight's Strength.
Thorny Armor - Reaction: When the Knight takes damage from an attack within Melee range, you can mark a Stress to deal 1d10+5 physical damage to the attacker.

entries.name: OAK TREANT
entries.description:
Tier 3 Bruiser
A sturdy animated old-growth tree.
Motives & Tactics: Hide in plain sight, preserve the forest, root down intruders
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 22/40 | HP: 7 | Stress: 4
ATK: +2 | Branch: Very Close | 3d8+2 phy
Experience: Forest Knowledge +3

FEATURES
Just a Tree - Passive: Before they make their first attack in a fight or after they become Hidden, the Treant is indistinguishable from a normal tree. They don't act or a PC succeeds on an Instinct Roll to identify them.
Seed Barrage - Action: Mark a Stress and make an attack against up to three targets within Close range, pummeling them with pinecones and berries. Targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll to avoid taking 3d6 physical damage.
Take Root - Action: Mark a Stress to Root the Treant in place. The Treant is Restrained while Rooted, and can not this effect instead of moving while they are spotlighted. While Rooted, the Treant has resistance to physical damage.

entries.name: TREANT SAPLING
entries.description:
Tier 3 Minion
A small animated tree sapling.
Motives & Tactics: Blend in, preserve the forest, pummel, surround
Difficulty: 14 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +1 | Branch: Melee | 1d8+1 phy

FEATURES
Minion (+) - Passive: The Sapling is defeated when they take any damage. For every 6 damage a PC deals to the Sapling, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Treant Saplings within Close range of them. Those Saplings must make a group attack roll against the shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 8 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: HEAD VAMPIRE
entries.description:
Tier 3 Leader
A captivating undead dressed in aristocratic finery.
Motives & Tactics: Create thralls, charm, command, fly, intimidate
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 22/42 | HP: 5 | Stress: 5
ATK: +5 | Rapier: Melee | 2d20+4 phy
Experience: Aristocrat +3

FEATURES
Terrifying - Passive: When the Vampire makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose a Hope and you gain a Fear.
Look into My Eyes - Passive: A creature who moves into Melee range of the Vampire must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, you gain 1d4 Fear.
Fade Away - Reaction: When the Vampire takes damage within range of an ally, they can cause the ally to mark a HP. The Vampire then clears a HP.
The Hunt Is On - Action: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4 Vampires, who appear at Far range and immediately take the spotlight.
Life Drain - Action: When the Vampire is spotlighted, roll a d8. On a result of 6 or higher, all targets within Very Close range must mark a HP.

entries.name: VAMPIRE
entries.description:
Tier 3 Standard
An intelligent undead with blood-stained lips and a predator's smile.
Motives & Tactics: Bite, charm, deceive, feed, intimidate
Difficulty: 16 | Thresholds: 18/35 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: +3 | Rapier: Melee | 3d8 phy
Experience: Nocturnal Hunter +3

FEATURES
Draining Bite - Action: Make an attack against a target within Melee range. On a success, deal 5d4+4 physical damage and clear a HP. The target loses 2 Hope and must mark a Stress. The Vampire then clears a HP.
Mistform - Reaction: When the Vampire takes physical damage, you can spend a Fear to take half damage.

entries.name: VAULT GUARDIAN GAOLER
entries.description:
Tier 3 Support
A boxy, dust-covered construct with thick metallic swinging doors on its chest.
Motives & Tactics: Carry away, entrap, protect, pummel
Difficulty: 16 | Thresholds: 19/33 | HP: 5 | Stress: 3
ATK: +2 | Body Bash: Very Close | 3d8+2 phy

FEATURES
Blocking Shield - Passive: Creatures within Melee range of the Gaoler have advantage on attack rolls against them. Creatures trapped inside the Gaoler are immune to this feature.
Lock Up - Action: Mark a Stress to make an attack against a target within Very Close range. On a success, the target is Restrained within the Gaoler until freed with a successful Strength Roll (18). While Restrained this way, on each of the Gaoler's turns, the creature

entries.name: VAULT GUARDIAN SENTINEL
entries.description:
Tier 3 Bruiser
A dust-covered golden construct with boxy limbs and a huge mace for a hand.
Motives & Tactics: Destroy at any cost, expunge, protect
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 21/40 | HP: 6 | Stress: 3
ATK: +4 | Charged Mace: Very Close | 2d12+4 phy

FEATURES
Kinetic Slam - Passive: Targets who take damage from the Sentinel's standard attack are knocked back to Very Close range.
Rev It - Action: The Sentinel can Restrain itself to charge their attack. While Restrained this way, the Sentinel gains +2 to attack rolls when they're within Very Close range of the Sentinel. The Sentinel can end this effect with their movement.
Mana Bolt - Action: Spend a Fear to lob explosive magic at a point within Far range. All targets within Very Close range of them take 3d6 magical damage. Targets who fail a Reaction Roll take 2d6 magic damage and are knocked back to Close range. Targets who succeed take half damage and are knocked back to Far range.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Sentinel makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: VAULT GUARDIAN TURRET
entries.description:
Tier 3 Standard
A metallic construct built around ranged armor and lucite piston-driven mechanical legs.
Motives & Tactics: Concentrate fire, lock down, mark, protect
Difficulty: 16 | Thresholds: 20/32 | HP: 5 | Stress: 4
ATK: +3 | Magical Cannon: Far | 3d10+3 mag

FEATURES
Slow Firing - Passive: When you spotlight the Turret and they don't have a token on their stat block, they can't make a standard attack. Place a token on their stat block and describe what they're preparing to do. When you spotlight the Turret and they have a token on their stat block, clear the token and they can attack.
Mark Target - Action: Spend a Fear to Mark a target within Far range until the Turret is destroyed or the Marked target becomes Hidden or moves out of the Turret's range.
Concentrate Fire - Reaction: When another adversary deals damage to a target within Far range of the Turret, you can mark a Stress to add the Turret's standard attack damage to the damage roll.
Detonation - Reaction: When the Turret is destroyed, they explode. All targets within Close range must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d20 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

entries.name: YOUNG ICE DRAGON
entries.description:
Tier 3 Solo
A glacier-blue dragon with four powerful limbs and frost-tinged wings.
Motives & Tactics: Avalanche, defend lair, fly, freeze, defend what is theirs, maul
Difficulty: 18 | Thresholds: 21/41 | HP: 10 | Stress: 6
ATK: +7 | Bite and Claws: Close | 4d10 phy
Experience: Protect What is Mine +3

FEATURES
Relentless (3) - Passive: The Dragon can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual for each.
Rend and Crush - Passive: If a target damaged by the Dragon doesn't mark an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they mark a Stress.
No Hope - Passive: When a PC rolls with Fear while within Far range of the Dragon, they lose a Hope.
Blizzard Breath - Action: Spend 2 Fear to release an icy whorl in front of the Dragon within Close range. All targets in this area must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 4d6+5 magic damage and are Restrained by an until they break free. Targets who succeed take half damage. Targets who succeed and mark 2 Stress or take half damage.
Avalanche - Action: Spend a Fear to have the Dragon unleash a huge downfall of snow and ice, covering all other creatures within Far range. All targets within this area must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll or become Restrained and Vulnerable until they dig themselves out from the debris. For each PC that fails the reaction roll, you gain a Fear.
Frozen Scales - Reaction: When a creature makes a successful attack against the Dragon from within Very Far range with a physical attack, they are Chilled until the end of their next turn. If they rest or they clear a Stress. While they are Chilled, they have disadvantage on attack rolls.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Dragon makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: TIER 4 ADVERSARIES (LEVELS 8-10)
entries.description:
TIER 4 ADVERSARIES
(LEVELS 8-10)

entries.name: ARCH-NECROMANCER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
A decaying mage adorned in dark, tattered robes.
Motives & Tactics: Dominate, decay, torment, live another day, rule the living
Difficulty: 21 | Thresholds: 31/66 | HP: 9 | Stress: 5
ATK: +6 | Necrotic Blast: Far | 4d12+3 mag
Experience: Forbidden Knowledge +3, Wisdom of Centuries +3

FEATURES
Dance of Death - Action: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage, but every critical success creates a Zombie.
Reanimate - Action: Spend a Fear to summon 2d4 targets within Far range to make a Strength Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d20+12 magic damage and you gain a Fear. Targets who succeed take half damage. A target who makes 2 or more HP must also clear 2 Stress and becomes Vulnerable until they roll out of range.
Open the Gates of Death - Action: Spend a Fear to summon a Zombie horde and make an attack against all targets within Far range. Targets take 3d10 magic damage and lose a Hope.
Not Today, My Dears - Reaction: When the Necromancer has marked 7 or more of their HP, you can spend a Fear to have them teleport away to a safe location to recover. A PC who succeeds on an Instinct Roll can trace the teleportation magic to its destination.
Your Life is Mine - Reaction: Countdown (Looming 2d6). When the Necromancer has marked 6 or more of their HP, activate the countdown. When it triggers, deal 2d10+6 direct magic damage to a target within Close range. The Necromancer then clears a HP. This continues, resetting the countdown to the number of HP marked by the target from this attack.

entries.name: FALLEN SORCERER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Support
A powerful mage bound by the bargains they made in life.
Motives & Tactics: Acquire, dishearten, dominate, torment
Difficulty: 19 | Thresholds: 26/42 | HP: 5 | Stress: 5
ATK: +4 | Corrupted Staff: Far | 4d8+10 mag
Experience: Ancient Knowledge +2

FEATURES
Conflagration - Action: Spend a Fear to unleash an all-consuming firestorm and make an attack against all targets within Close range. Targets the Sorcerer succeeds against take 5d10+6 magic damage and are Vulnerable until they rest.
Nightmare Tableau - Action: Mark a Stress to trap a target within Far range in a powerful illusion of their personal enemy. While trapped, the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free, ending both conditions, with a successful Instinct Roll.
Slippery - Reaction: When the Sorcerer takes damage from an attack or spell, spend up to Far range until the end of scene.
Shields of Guilt - Reaction: When an adversary within range of the Sorcerer is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, all targets within Far range must spend 3 Hope or clear a HP. This effect only triggers on its greatest regrets. A target can break free from their regret with a successful Presence or Strength Roll. When a PC tries to break free, they lose a Hope.

entries.name: FALLEN SHOCK TROOP
entries.description:
Tier 4 Minion
A cursed soul bound to the Fallen's will.
Motives & Tactics: Crush, dominate, earn relief, punish
Difficulty: 15 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +2 | Cursed Axe: Very Close | 12 phy

FEATURES
Minion (12) - Passive: The Shock Troop is defeated when they take any damage. For every 12 damage a PC deals to the Shock Troop, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Aura of Despair - Passive: When a PC marks HP from an attack by the Shock Troop, they lose a Hope.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Fallen Shock Troops within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 12 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: FALLEN WARLORD: REALM-BREAKER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
A powerful warlord armored in rage and resentment, bearing millennia of experience in breaking heroes' spirits.
Motives & Tactics: Corrupt, dominate, punish, break the weak
Difficulty: 20 | Thresholds: 36/66 | HP: 8 | Stress: 5
ATK: +7 | Barbed Whip: Close | 4d8+7 phy
Experience: Conquest +3, History +2, Intimidation +3

FEATURES
Relentless (2) - Passive: The Realm-Breaker can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Fireproof Plate Armor - Passive: When the Realm-Breaker takes damage, reduce it by 2d10.
Tormenting Lash - Action: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. When a target takes damage from this attack, they must also clear at least 2 Armor Slots.
All-Consuming Rage - Reaction: Countdown (Decreasing 6). When the Realm-Breaker is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, create a torrent of incarnate rage centered around the Realm-Breaker. All creatures within range must make a Presence Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 2d6+10 direct magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage. Then restart the countdown. If there are no more Fallen Shock Troop within Very Close range of the target who marked that HP. If the countdown ever decreases its maximum value to 0, the Realm-Breaker marks their remaining HP and all targets within Far range mark all remaining HP and make a Fear.
Doombringer - Reaction: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Realm-Breaker, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.
I Have Never Known Defeat (Phase Change) - Reaction: When the Realm-Breaker marks their last HP, replace them with the Undefeated Champion and immediately spotlight them.

entries.name: FALLEN WARLORD: UNDEFEATED CHAMPION
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
That which only the most fierce have a chance to fear.
Motives & Tactics: Desperate measures, death, punish, undefiant, secure victory at any cost
Difficulty: 18 | Thresholds: 35/58 | HP: 11 | Stress: 5
ATK: +8 | Heart-Shattering Sword: Very Close | 4d12+13 phy
Experience: Conquest +3, History +2, Intimidation +3

FEATURES
Relentless (3) - Passive: The Undefeated Champion can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual for each turn.
Full Assault - Action: When the Undefeated Champion takes damage, reduce it by 1d10.
Shattering Strike - Action: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all targets within Very Close range. PCs the Champion succeeds against lose a number of Hope equal to the amount of damage taken.
Endless Legions - Action: Spend a Fear to summon a number of Fallen Shock Troops equal to twice the number of PCs. The Shock Troops appear at Far range.
Circle of Defilement - Reaction: Countdown (Left). When the Undefeated Champion is in the spotlight for the first time, activate the countdown. When it triggers, activate a magical circle covering the area within Far range of the Champion. All creatures in this area are Vulnerable until they leave the circle. The circle can be destroyed with a successful attack against it. The Undefeated Champion cannot move or be moved outside the circle.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Undefeated Champion makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.
Doombringer - Reaction: When a target marks HP from an attack by the Undefeated Champion, all PCs within Far range of the target must lose a Hope.

entries.name: HALLOWED SOLDIER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Minion
Souls of the faithful, lifted up with divine weaponry.
Motives & Tactics: Obey, outmaneuver, punish, swarm
Difficulty: 13 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +2 | Sword and Shield: Melee | 10 phy

FEATURES
Minion (13) - Passive: The Soldier is defeated when they take any damage. For every 13 damage a PC deals to the Soldier, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Divine Fervor - Passive: While the Soldier is living, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Hallowed Soldiers within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 10 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: HALLOWED ARCHER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Standard
Spirit soldiers with sanctified bows.
Motives & Tactics: Focus fire, obey, reposition, volley
Difficulty: 19 | Thresholds: 25/45 | HP: 3 | Stress: 2
ATK: +5 | Sanctified Longbow: Far | 3d8+8 phy

FEATURES
Punish Heresy - Passive: The Archer deals double damage to targets marked Guilty by a High Seraph.
Divine Volley - Action: Mark a Stress to make a standard attack against all Hostile targets.

entries.name: HIGH SERAPH
entries.description:
Tier 4 Leader
A celestial champion, head of a hallowed host of warriors who enforce their god's will.
Motives & Tactics: Enforce dogma, fly, prosecute heresy, rally
Difficulty: 20 | Thresholds: 37/70 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +8 | Holy Sword: Very Close | 4d10+4 phy
Experience: Divine Knowledge +3

FEATURES
Relentless (2) - Passive: The Seraph can be spotlighted up to two times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Divine Flight - Passive: While the Seraph is flying, spend a Fear to move up to Far range instead of Close range before taking an action.
Judgment - Action: Spend a Fear to make a target Guilty in the eyes of the Seraph's god until the Seraph is defeated. While Guilty, the target doesn't gain Hope on a result with Hope. When the Seraph succeeds on a standard attack against a Guilty target, they deal Severe damage instead of their standard damage. The Seraph can only mark one target at a time.
God Rays - Action: Make an attack by sending down a searing beam of light that hits up to twenty targets within Very Far range. Targets must make a Presence Reaction Roll or take 4d6+12 magic damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.
We Are One - Action: Once per scene, spend a Fear to rally all other adversaries within Far range. Attacks they make while spotlighted in this way deal half damage.

entries.name: KRAKEN
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
A legendary beast of the sea, bigger than the largest galleon, with sucker-laden tentacles and a terrifying maw.
Motives & Tactics: Consume, crush, drown, grapple
Difficulty: 20 | Thresholds: 35/70 | HP: 11 | Stress: 5
ATK: +7 | Tentacles: Close | 4d12+6 phy
Experience: Swimming +3

FEATURES
Relentless (3) - Passive: The Kraken can be spotlighted up to three times per GM turn. Spend Fear as usual to spotlight them.
Many Tentacles - Passive: While the Kraken has 7 or fewer marked HP, they can make standard attack against three targets.
Way Too Big - Passive: The Kraken occupies a huge area.
Grapple and Drawn - Action: Make an attack roll against a target within Close range. On a success, the target is picked up with the Kraken. On a critical success, or if the target is Restrained and Vulnerable until they break free with a successful Strength Roll or the Kraken takes Major or greater damage. While Restrained and Vulnerable in this way, a target must mark a Stress at the start of their turn to escape action roll.
Ink Cloud - Action: The Kraken can create a choking cloud over any number of targets in a line up to Far range. All targets must succeed on an Agility Reaction Roll to avoid 2d8 physical damage. If a target marks an Armor Slot to reduce the damage, they lose 2 Hope.
Momentum - Reaction: When the Kraken makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

entries.name: ORACLE OF DOOM
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
A bearer of the immortal and incarnation of fate, cursed to only see bad news.
Motives & Tactics: Change environment, condemn, dishearten, loss and confusion
Difficulty: 20 | Thresholds: 38/68 | HP: 11 | Stress: 10
ATK: +5 | Psychic Attack: Far | 4d8+6 mag
Experience: Boundless Knowledge +4

FEATURES
Terrifying - Passive: When the Oracle makes a successful attack, all PCs within Far range lose Hope and you gain a Fear.
Walls Closing In - Passive: When a creature rolls a failure while within Very Close range, they must immediately take the spotlight.
Provocative Fate - Action: Spend a Fear to present a target within Far range a vision of their personal nightmare. The target experiences terror for a moment, loses a Hope, and takes 2d20+4 direct magic damage. On a success, they take half damage and lose a Hope.
Summon Tormentors - Action: Once per day, spend 2 Fear to summon 2d4 Tier 2 or below Minions relevant to one of the party's personal nightmares. These Minions are loyal to the PC.
Ominous Knowledge - Reaction: When the Oracle sees a mortal creature, they instantly know one of their personal nightmares.
Vengeful Fate - Reaction: When the Oracle marks HP from an attack by a creature, you can spend a Fear to force the creature to knock the attacker back to Far range and deal 2d10+4 physical damage.

entries.name: OUTER REALMS ABOMINATION
entries.description:
Tier 4 Bruiser
A chaotic mockery of life, constantly in flux.
Motives & Tactics: Demolish, devour, undermine
Difficulty: 19 | Thresholds: 35/71 | HP: 7 | Stress: 5
ATK: +2d4 | Massive Pseudopod: Very Close | 4d6+13 mag

FEATURES
Chaotic Form - Passive: When the Abomination attacks, roll 2d4 and use the result as their attack bonus.
Disorienting Presence - Passive: When a target takes damage from the Abomination, they must make an Instinct Reaction Roll. On a failure, they are Dazed until the end of the scene and you gain a Fear.
Reality Quake - Action: Spend a Fear to rend the edges of reality within Far range of the Abomination. All targets within that area must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll. Targets who fail must spend Hope or mark Armor Slots, HP, or Stress, they must double the amount spent or marked.
Unreal Form - Reaction: When the Abomination is attacked, you can reduce the damage they take to 1d20. If the Abomination marks 1 or fewer HP on a successful attack, activate a countdown of 4 hours.

entries.name: OUTER REALMS COMPUTER
entries.description:
Tier 4 Support
A shifting, formless mass seemingly made of chromatic light.
Motives & Tactics: Confuse, distract, overwhelm
Difficulty: 19 | Thresholds: 27/47 | HP: 4 | Stress: 3
ATK: +7 | Corrupting Pseudopod: Very Close | 2d8+5 mag

FEATURES
Will-Shattering Touch - Passive: When a PC takes damage from the Corruptor, they lose a Hope.
Degrade Reality Flotsam - Action: Mark a Stress to spew partially formed creatures of corrupted realities at all targets within Close range. Targets must succeed on a Knowledge Reaction Roll or mark 2 Stress.

entries.name: OUTER REALMS THRALL
entries.description:
Tier 4 Minion
A vaguely humanoid form stripped of memory and identity.
Motives & Tactics: Destroy, discard, disorient, intimidate
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: None | HP: 1 | Stress: 1
ATK: +3 | Claws and Teeth: Very Close | 11 phy

FEATURES
Minion (17) - Passive: The Thrall is defeated when they take any damage. For every 17 damage a PC deals to the Thrall, defeat an additional Minion within range the attack would succeed against.
Group Attack - Action: Spend a Fear to choose a target and spotlight all Outer Realm Thralls within Close range of them. Those Minions move into Melee range of the target and make one shared attack roll. On a success, they deal 11 physical damage each. Combine this damage.

entries.name: VOLCANIC DRAGON: OBSIDIAN PREDATOR
entries.description:
Tier 4 Solo
A massive winged creature with obsidian scales and impossibly sharp teeth.
Motives & Tactics: Defend lair, dive-bomb, fly, hunt, intimidate
Difficulty: 17 | Thresholds: 33/65 | HP: 6 | Stress: 5
ATK: +8 | Obsidian Claws: Close | 4d12+4 phy
Experience: Hunt from Above +5

FEATURES
