entries.name: TACTICIAN
entries.description:
Level 3 Bone Ability
Recall Cost: 1
When you Help an Ally, they can spend a Hope to add one of your Experiences to their roll alongside your advantage die.
When making a Tag Team Roll, you can roll a d20 as your Hope Die.

entries.name: BOOK OF AVA
entries.description:
Level 1 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Defying Fate: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within
Close range.
Ray of Success: They're knocked back to Far range and take
d10+2 magic damage using your Proficiency.
Paxx's Armor: Spend a Hope to give a target you can touch a
+1 bonus to their Armor Score until their next rest or you cast
Paxx's Armor again.
Ice Spike: Make a Spellcast Roll (12) to summon a large ice
spike within Far range. If you get hit a weapon, make the
attacker roll a Reaction Roll (13). On a failure or critical
success, deal d6 physical damage using your Proficiency.

entries.name: BOOK OF ILLIAT
entries.description:
Level 1 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Slumber: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very
Close range. On a success, they're Asleep until they take
damage or the GM spends a Fear on their turn to clear this
condition.
Arcane Damage: Spend a Hope to conjure a magical weapon
out of thin air. Any projectiles that strike a target of your choice
within Close range deal a number of d6s equal to the Hope
you spend and deal that much magic damage to the target.
Telepathy: Spend a Hope to open a line of mental
communication with one target you can see. This connection
lasts until your next rest or you cast Telepathy again.

entries.name: BOOK OF TYFAR
entries.description:
Level 1 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Wild Flame: Make a Spellcast Roll against up to three
targets within Very Close range. Targets you succeed against
take 2d6 magic damage and must make a Stress at flames
erupt from your hands.
Magic Hand: You conjure a magical hand with the same size
and strength as your own within Far range.
Mysterious Mist: Make a Spellcast Roll (13) to cast a
temporary thick fog that gathers in a stationary area within
Very Close range. The fog heavily obscures this area and
everything in it.

entries.name: BOOK OF STILL
entries.description:
Level 2 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Adjust Appearance: You magically shift your appearance and
position.
Parallelu: Spend 2 Hope to cast this spell on yourself or an ally
within Close range. The next time the target makes an attack,
they can hit an additional target within range that their attack
roll would succeed against. You can only hold this spell on one
creature at a time.
Illusion: Make a Spellcast Roll (14).
You can create a temporary visual illusion no larger than
you within Close range that lasts for as long as you look at it. It
holds up to scrutiny until an observer is within Melee range.

entries.name: BOOK OF VAGRAS
entries.description:
Level 2 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Arcane Lock: Choose one door that can be opened (or
something that can close (such as a lock, chest, or box). Once
per rest on a success, you can lock the object so it can only be
opened by creatures of your choice. Someone with access to
magic and an hour of time to study the spell can break it.
Arcane Door: When you have no adversaries within Melee
range, make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success, spend a
Hope to magically teleport to where you are to a point within
Far range you can see. It closes once a creature has passed
through it.
Reveal: Make a Spellcast Roll. If there is anything magically
hidden within Close range, it is revealed.

entries.name: BOOK OF KORVAX
entries.description:
Level 3 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Levitation: Make a Spellcast Roll to temporarily lift a target
you can see up into the air and move them within Close range
of their original position.
Restore: Make a Spellcast Roll on a target within Melee range
to make a Reaction Roll (15). On a failure, they forget the last
minute of your conversation.
Rune Circle: Mark a Stress to create a temporary magical
circle on the ground where you stand. All adversaries within
Melee range, or who enter Melee range, take 2d12+4 magic
damage and are knocked back to Very Close range.

entries.name: BOOK OF NORAL
entries.description:
Level 3 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Mystic Tether: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far
range. On a success, they are temporarily restrained and must
mark a Stress. If you target a flying creature, this spell grounds
them temporarily. Restores them.
Fireball: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Far
range. On a success, hurl a sphere of fire toward them that
explodes on impact. The target and all creatures within Very
Close range of them must make a Reaction Roll (13). Targets
who fail take 3d10+6 fire damage using your Proficiency.
Targets who succeed take half damage.

entries.name: BOOK OF EXOTA
entries.description:
Level 4 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 3
Repudiate: You can interrupt a magical effect taking place.
Make a reaction roll using your Spellcast trait. Once per rest on
a success, the effect stops and any consequences are avoided.
Create Construct: Spend a Hope to choose a group of objects
around you and create an animated construct from them that
obeys basic commands. Make a Spellcast Roll to command
them. These constructs have similar features, resistances,
and traits and their attacks deal 2d10+3 physical damage. You
can only maintain one construct at a time, and they fall apart
when they take any amount of damage.

entries.name: BOOK OF GRYNN
entries.description:
Level 6 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Arcane Deflection: Once per long rest, spend a Hope to negate
the damage of an attack targeting you or an ally within Very
Close range.
Time Lock: Target an object within Far range. That object stops
in time and space exactly where it is until your next rest. If a
creature tries to move it, make a Spellcast Roll against them to
maintain this spell.
Spellwall: Make a Spellcast Roll (15). On a success,
create a temporary wall of magical flame between two points
within Far range. All creatures in its path must choose a side to
be on, and anything that subsequently passes through the wall
takes 4d10+3 magic damage.

entries.name: MANIFEST WALL
entries.description:
Level 5 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 2
Make a Spellcast Roll (15). Once per rest on a success, spend
a Hope to call up a wall of hard light that appears anywhere
within Far range. It can be up to 50 feet high and form at any
angle. Creatures or objects in its path are shunted to a side of
your choice. The wall stays up until your next rest or you cast
Manifest Wall again.

entries.name: TELEPORT
entries.description:
Level 5 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 2
Once per long rest, you can instantly teleport yourself and any
number of willing targets within Close range to a place you've
Seen before. Choose one of the following options, then make a
Spellcast Roll:
• If you know the place very well, gain a +5 bonus.
• If you've visited the place frequently, gain a +1 bonus.
• If you've visited the place infrequently, gain no modifier.
• If you've only been there once, gain a -2 penalty.
On a success, you appear where you intended to go.
On a failure, you appear elsewhere, with the range of failure
determining how far off course.

entries.name: BANISH
entries.description:
Level 6 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 0
Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On
a success, spend an amount of d20s equal to your Spellcast trait.
The target must make a reaction roll with a Difficulty equal
to your highest result. On a success, the target must mark a
Stress and is Dazed until they clear it. Once per rest on a failure, they are
banished from this realm.
When the PCs roll with Fear, the Difficulty gains a +1 penalty,
and the target makes another reaction roll. On a success, they
return from banishment.

entries.name: SIGIL OF RETRIBUTION
entries.description:
Level 6 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 2
Mark an adversary within Close range with a sigil of
retribution. The GM gains a Fear. When the marked adversary
deals damage to you or your allies, place a d8 on the card.
You can activate this sigil as a reaction at any time. When you do,
you can mark a number of d6s equal to your level. When you
successfully attack the marked adversary, roll the dice on this
card and deal that much magic damage when you deal the sigil.
This effect ends when the marked adversary is reduced to 0 HP,
cast Sigil of Retribution again.

entries.name: BOOK OF HOMET
entries.description:
Level 7 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 0
Pass Through: Make a Spellcast Roll (13). Once per rest on a
success, you and all creatures touching you can pass through a
wall or door within Close range. The effect ends once everyone
is on the other side.
Plane Gate: Make a Spellcast Roll (14). Once per long rest on
a success, you can gateway to a location or another dimension
or plane of existence you've been to before. This gateway lasts
until your next rest.

entries.name: CODEX-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Codex Ability
Recall Cost: 2
When 4 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from
the Codex domain, gain the following benefits:
• You can mark a Stress to add your Proficiency to a
Spellcast Roll.
• Once per rest, replace this card with any card from your
Codex Grimoire without paying its Recall Cost.

entries.name: BOOK OF VYOLA
entries.description:
Level 8 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Memory Delve: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within
Far range. On a success, peer into the target's mind and ask
up to three questions. The GM describes any memories the target
has pertaining to the answer.
Shared Clarity: Once per long rest, spend a Hope to choose
two willing creatures. When one of them would mark Stress,
they can choose between the two of them who marks it. This
spell lasts until their next rest.

entries.name: SAFE HAVEN
entries.description:
Level 8 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 3
When you have a few minutes of calm to focus, you can spend
2 Hope to summon your Safe Haven, a large interdimensional
space that opens like a doorway next to you. When you do so,
a magical door appears somewhere within Close range. Only
creatures of your choice can enter. Once inside, you can make
the entrance invisible. You and anyone else inside can always
exit. Once you leave, the doorway must be summoned again.
When you take a rest within your own Safe Haven, you can
choose an additional downtime move.

entries.name: BOOK OF RONIN
entries.description:
Level 6 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 4
Transform: Make a Spellcast Roll (15). On a success, transform into an inanimate object no larger than twice your normal size. You can remain in this shape until you take damage.
Eternal Generation: Once per long rest, make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, they become permanently Vulnerable. They can't clear this condition by any means.

entries.name: BOOK OF YARROW
entries.description:
Level 10 Codex Grimoire
Recall Cost: 2
Timeweaver: Make a Spellcast Roll (18). On a success, time temporarily slows to a halt for everyone within Far range except for you. It resumes the next time you make an action roll that targets another creature.
Magic Immunity: Spend 5 Hope to become immune to magic damage until your next rest.

entries.name: THROUGH YOUR EYES
entries.description:
Level 8 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 1
Chosen: a target within Very Far range. You can see through their eyes and hear through their ears. You can transition between using your own senses or the target's freely until you cast another spell or until your next rest.

entries.name: ASTRAL PROJECTION
entries.description:
Level 9 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 0
Once per long rest, mark a Stress to create a projected copy of yourself that can appear anywhere you've been before. You can see and hear through the projection as though it were you and affect the world as though you were there. A creature investigating the projection can tell it's of magical origin. This effect lasts until your next rest or your projection takes any damage.

entries.name: DISINTEGRATION WAVE
entries.description:
Level 9 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 4
Make a Spellcast Roll (18). Once per long rest on a success, the GM tells you which adversaries within Far range have a Difficulty of 18 or lower. Mark a Stress for each one you wish to hit with this spell. They are killed and can't come back to life by any means.

entries.name: TRANSCENDENT UNION
entries.description:
Level 10 Codex Spell
Recall Cost: 1
Once per long rest, spend 5 Hope to cast this spell on two or more willing creatures. Until your next rest, when a creature connected by this union clears a condition, all others in the connected creature can choose who marks it.

entries.name: THOUGHT DELVER
entries.description:
Level 5 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 2
You can peek into the minds of others. Spend a Hope to read the surface thoughts of a target within Far range. Make a Spellcast Roll against the target to delve for deeper, more guarded thoughts.
On a roll with Fear, the target might, at the GM's discretion, become aware that you're reading their thoughts.

entries.name: MASS ENRAPTURE
entries.description:
Level 8 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 3
Make a Spellcast Roll against all targets within Far range. On a success, the affected targets become temporarily Enraptured. While Enraptured, a target's attention is fixed on you, narrowing their field of view and drowning out any sound but your voice. Mark a Stress to force all Enraptured targets to mark a Stress, ending this spell.

entries.name: WORDS OF DISCORD
entries.description:
Level 5 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 1
Whisper words of discord to an adversary within Melee range and make a Spellcast Roll (10). On a success, the target must mark a Stress and make an attack against another adversary instead of against you or your allies.
Once this attack is over, the target realizes what happened. The next time you cast Words of Discord on them, gain a +5 to your Spellcast Roll.

entries.name: COPYCAT
entries.description:
Level 9 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 3
Once per long rest, this card can mimic the features of another domain's level 6 or lower in another player's loadout. Spend Hope equal to half the card's level to gain access to the feature. It lasts until your next rest or they place the card in their vault.

entries.name: DEFT DECEIVER
entries.description:
Level 1 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 2
Spend a Hope to gain advantage on a roll to deceive or trick someone into believing a lie you tell them.

entries.name: TROUBLEMAKER
entries.description:
Level 2 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 2
When you taunt or provoke a target within Far range, make a Presence Roll against them. Once per rest on a success, roll a d6 and mark that much magic proficiency. The target must mark a Stress equal to the highest result rolled.

entries.name: NEVER UPSTAGED
entries.description:
Level 6 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 2
When an ally takes Hit Points from an attack, you can mark a Stress to place a number of tokens equal to the number of Hit Points you marked on this card. On your next successful attack, gain a +5 bonus to your damage roll for each token on this card, then clear all tokens.

entries.name: MASTER OF THE CRAFT
entries.description:
Level 9 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 0
Gain a permanent +2 bonus to two of your Experiences or a permanent +1 bonus to one of your Experiences. Then place this card in your vault permanently.

entries.name: ENRAPTURE
entries.description:
Level 1 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 0
Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, they become temporarily Enraptured. While Enraptured, a target's attention is fixed on you, narrowing their field of view and drowning out any sound but your voice. Once per rest on a success, you can mark a Stress to force the Enraptured target to mark a Stress as well.

entries.name: HYPNOTIC SHIMMER
entries.description:
Level 3 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 2
Make a Spellcast Roll against all adversaries in front of you within Close range. Once per rest on a success, create an illusion of flashing colors and lights that temporarily Stuns targets you succeed against and forces them to make a Stress. While Stunned, they can't use reactions and can't take any other actions until they clear this condition.

entries.name: SHARE THE BURDEN
entries.description:
Level 5 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 0
Once per rest, take on the Stress from a willing creature within Close range when describing what empathy, knowledge, or emotions telepathically leak from their mind in this moment. Between you, transfer any number of their marked Stress to you, then gain a Hope for each Stress transferred.

entries.name: ENCORE
entries.description:
Level 10 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 1
When an ally within Close range deals damage to an adversary, you can make a Spellcast Roll against that same target. On a success, they take magic damage equal to half the original damage dealt. If your Spellcast Roll succeeds with Fear, then place this card in your vault.

entries.name: INSPIRATIONAL WORDS
entries.description:
Level 1 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 1
Your speech is imbued with power. After a long rest, place a number of tokens on this card equal to your Presence. When you speak with an ally, you can spend a token from this card to give them advantage on their following options:
• Your ally clears a Stress.
• Your ally clears a Hit Point.
• Your ally gains a Hope.
When you take a long rest, clear all unspent tokens.

entries.name: INVISIBILITY
entries.description:
Level 3 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 1
Make a Spellcast Roll (10). On a success, mark a Stress and become temporarily Invisible, or an ally becomes temporarily Invisible. An Invisible creature can't be seen except through magical means and attack rolls against them are made with disadvantage. Place a number of tokens on this card equal to your Spellcast trait. When the Invisible creature takes an action or you activate a spell or ability, mark a token. When you expends the last token is resolved, the effect ends.
You can only hold Invisibility on one creature at a time.

entries.name: ENDLESS CHARISMA
entries.description:
Level 7 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 2
After you make an action roll to persuade, lie, or garner favor, you can spend a Hope to reroll the Hope or Fair Die.

entries.name: NOTORIOUS
entries.description:
Level 10 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 0
People know who you are and what you've done, and they treat you differently because of it. When you leverage your notoriety to get what you want, you can mark a Stress before you roll to have shopkeepers give you whatever you want for free. In a conversation, you have advantage wherever you go, and everything else you buy is reduced in price by one bag of gold to a minimum of one handful.
This doesn't count against your loadout's domain card maximum of 5 and can't be placed in your vault.

entries.name: TELL NO LIES
entries.description:
Level 2 Grace Spell
Recall Cost: 1
Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Close range. On a success, they can't lie to you while they remain within range. When you try to ask them something directly and ask them a question and they refuse to answer, they must mark a Stress and the effect ends. The target is typically unaware this spell has been cast on them until it causes them to utter the truth.

entries.name: SOOTHING SPEECH
entries.description:
Level 4 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 1
During a short rest, when you take the time to comfort another character while using the Tend to Wounds downtime move on them, clear an additional Hit Point on that character. When you do, you also clear 2 Hit Points.

entries.name: GRACE-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Grace Ability
Recall Cost: 1
When 4 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from the Grace domain, gain the following benefits:
• You can mark an Armor Slot instead of marking a Stress.
• When you would force a target to mark a number of Hit Points, you can choose instead to force them to mark that number of Stress.

entries.name: PICK AND PULL
entries.description:
Level 1 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 0

Use an action to attempt a Finesse roll to pick nonmagical locks, disarm nonmagical traps, or steal items from a target (either through stealth or by force).

entries.name: RAIN OF BLADES
entries.description:
Level 1 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend a Hope to make a Spellcast Roll and conjure throwing blades that strike out at all targets within Very Close range. Targets you succeed against take d8+2 magic damage using your Proficiency.

If a target you hit is Vulnerable, they take an extra 1d8 damage.

entries.name: UNCANNY DISGUISE
entries.description:
Level 3 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 0

When you have a few minutes to prepare, you can mark a Stress to don the facade of any humanoid you can picture clearly in your mind. While disguised, you have advantage on Presence Rolls to avoid scrutiny.

Place a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait on this card. When you take an action while disguised, spend a token from this card. After the action that spends the last token is resolved, the disguise drops.

entries.name: MIDNIGHT SPIRIT
entries.description:
Level 2 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend a Hope to summon a humanoid-sized spirit that can move or carry things for you until your next rest.

You can also send it to attack an adversary. When you do, place a token on this card and make an attack against them. On a success, the spirit moves into Melee range with that target. Roll 1d10 magic damage equal to your Spellcast trait and deal that much magic damage to the target. The spirit then disappears. You can only have one spirit at a time.

entries.name: SHADOWBIND
entries.description:
Level 2 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 0

Make a Spellcast Roll against all adversaries within Very Close range. Targets you succeed against are temporarily Restrained as their shadow binds them in place.

entries.name: CHOKEHOLD
entries.description:
Level 3 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 0

When you position yourself behind a creature who's about your size, you can mark a Stress to pull them into a chokehold, making them temporarily Vulnerable.

When a creature attacks a target who is Vulnerable in this way, they deal an extra 2d6 damage.

entries.name: VEIL OF NIGHT
entries.description:
Level 3 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success, you can move unseen between two points within Far range. Only creatures looking through this darkness, who are considered Hidden to adversaries on the other side of the veil, and you have advantage on attacks you make through the darkness. The veil remains until you cast another spell.

entries.name: STEALTH EXPERTISE
entries.description:
Level 4 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 0

When you roll with Fear while attempting to move unnoticed through a dangerous area, you can mark a Stress to roll with Hope instead.

If an ally within Close range is also attempting to move unnoticed and rolls with Fear, you can mark a Stress to change their result to a roll with Hope.

entries.name: GLYPH OF NIGHTFALL
entries.description:
Level 4 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Very Close range. On a success, spend a Hope to conjure a dark glyph upon their body that exposes their weak points, temporarily reducing the target's Difficulty by a value equal to your Knowledge trait.

entries.name: HUSH
entries.description:
Level 5 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range. On a success, spend a Hope to conjure suppressive magic around the target that encompasses everything within Very Close range of them and follows them as they move.

The target and anything within the area is Silenced until the GM spends a Fear on their turn to clear this condition, you cast again, or you take Major damage. While Silenced, they cannot cast spells or activate magical abilities.

entries.name: PHANTOM RETREAT
entries.description:
Level 5 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Spend a Hope to activate Phantom Retreat where you're currently standing. Spend another Hope at any time before your next rest to disappear from where you are and reappear where you were standing when you activated Phantom Retreat. This spell ends after you reappear.

entries.name: DARK WHISPERS
entries.description:
Level 6 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 0

You can speak into the mind of any person with whom you've made physical contact. Once you've opened a channel with them, they can speak back into your mind. Additionally, you can mark a Stress to make a Spellcast Roll against them. On a success, you can ask the GM one of the following questions about them:
• Where are they?
• What are they doing?
• What are they afraid of?
• What do they cherish most in the world?

entries.name: MASS DISGUISE
entries.description:
Level 6 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 2

When you have a few minutes of silence to focus, you can mark a Stress to change the appearance of all willing creatures within Close range to appear as a different species or change body structure and size, and can be somebody or something you've seen before or entirely fabricated. A disguised creature has advantage on Presence Rolls to avoid scrutiny.

Activate a Countdown (5). It ticks down as a consequence the GM chooses. When it triggers, the disguise drops.

entries.name: MIDNIGHT-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 0

When 4 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from the Midnight domain, gain the following benefits:
• Once per rest, when you have 0 Hope and the GM would ask you to make a roll, you can mark a Stress to make a successful roll instead. When you make a successful attack, you can mark a Stress to add the result of your Fear Die to your damage roll.

entries.name: VANISHING DODGE
entries.description:
Level 7 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

When an attack made against you that would deal physical damage fails, you can spend a Hope to envelop yourself in shadowy, becoming Hidden and teleporting to a point within Close range of the attacker. You remain Hidden until the next time you make an action roll.

entries.name: SHADOWHUNTER
entries.description:
Level 8 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 2

Your prowess is enhanced under the cover of shadow. While you're standing in low light or darkness, you gain a +1 bonus to your Evasion and make attack rolls with advantage.

entries.name: SPELL CHARGE
entries.description:
Level 8 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

When you take magic damage, place tokens equal to the number of Hit Points you marked on this card. You can store a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait.

When you make a successful attack against a target, you can spend any number of tokens to add a d6 for each token spent to your damage roll.

entries.name: NIGHT TERROR
entries.description:
Level 9 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Once per long rest, choose any targets within Very Close range to perceive you as a nightmarish horror. The targets must succeed on a Reaction Roll (14) or become temporarily Horrified. While Horrified, they're Vulnerable. Steal a number of Fear from the GM equal to the number of targets that are Horrified. Additionally, when you deal damage, add to that damage a number of d6s equal to the number of stolen Fear and deal the total damage to each Horrified target. Discard the stolen Fear.

entries.name: TWILIGHT TOLL
entries.description:
Level 9 Midnight Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Choose a target within Far range. When you succeed on an action roll against them that doesn't result in making a damage roll, place a token on this card. When you deal damage to this target, you can spend any number of tokens to add a d12 for each token you spend to your damage roll. You can only hold twilight toll tokens equal to your Spellcast trait and can only place one token on one creature at a time.

When you choose a new target or take a rest, clear all unspent tokens.

entries.name: ECLIPSE
entries.description:
Level 10 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (16). Once per long rest on a success, plunge the entire area within Far range into complete darkness only you and your allies can see through. Attack rolls have advantage against creatures who can't see through the darkness.

Additionally, when you or an ally succeeds with Hope against an adversary within this shadow, the target must mark a Stress.

This spell lasts until the GM spends a Fear on their turn to clear this effect or you take Severe damage.

entries.name: SPECTER OF THE DARK
entries.description:
Level 10 Midnight Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Mark a Stress to become Spectral until you make an action roll targeting another creature. While Spectral, you're immune to physical damage and can float and pass through solid objects. Other creatures can still see you while you're in this form.

entries.name: GIFTED TRACKER
entries.description:
Level 1 Sage Ability
Recall Cost: 0

When you're tracking a specific creature or group of creatures on the ground, make a Spellcast Roll to track them instead and ask the GM that many questions from the following list:

• What direction did they go?
• How long ago did they pass through?
• Where were they doing in this location?
• How many of them were here?

When you encounter creatures you've tracked in this way, gain a +1 bonus to your Evasion against them.

entries.name: NATURE'S TONGUE
entries.description:
Level 1 Sage Ability
Recall Cost: 0

You can speak the language of the natural world. When you try to speak with beasts and animals around you, make an Instinct Roll (12). On a success, they'll give you the information they know. On a roll with Fear, their knowledge will be limited or they'll be afraid to answer.

Additionally, before you make a Spellcast Roll while within a natural environment, you can spend a Hope to gain a +2 bonus to the roll.

entries.name: VICIOUS ENTANGLE
entries.description:
Level 1 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, roots and vines reach out from the ground, dealing 1d8+1 physical damage and temporarily Restraining the target. Additionally, you can spend a Hope to conjure another adversary within Very Close range of your target.

entries.name: CONJURE SWARM
entries.description:
Level 2 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Tokana Armored Beetles: Mark a Stress to conjure armored beetles that encircle you. When you next take damage, reduce the severity by one threshold. You can spend a Hope to keep the beetles conjured after taking damage.

Fire Flies: Make a Spellcast Roll against all adversaries within Close range. Spend a Hope to deal 2d8+3 magic damage to each target you succeed against.

entries.name: NATURAL FAMILIAR
entries.description:
Level 2 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

By whispering to animals, a small nature spirit or forest critter to your side until your next rest. You can Natural Familiar again, or the familiar is targeted by an attack. If you spend an additional Hope, you can summon a familiar that flies. You can communicate with them, make a Spellcast Roll to command them to perform simple tasks, and mark a Stress to see through their eyes.

When you deal damage to an adversary within Melee range of your familiar, you add a d6 to your damage roll.

entries.name: CORROSIVE PROJECTILE
entries.description:
Level 3 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, deal d8+4 magic damage using your Proficiency. Additionally, mark 2 or more Stress to make them permanently Corroded. While a target is Corroded, they gain a -1 penalty to their Difficulty for every 2 Stress you spent. The condition can stack.

entries.name: TOWERING STALK
entries.description:
Level 3 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Once per rest, you can conjure a thick, twisting stalk within Close range that can be easily climbed. It's height can grow up to Far range.

Mark a Stress to use this spell as an attack. Make a Spellcast Roll against an adversary or group of adversaries within Close range. The erupting stalk lifts targets you succeed against into the air and drops them, dealing d8 physical damage using your Proficiency.

entries.name: DEATH GRIP
entries.description:
Level 4 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Close range and choose one of the following options:

• You can teleport to within Melee range of yourself and the target.
• Melee range of them.
• You constrict the target and force them to mark 2 Stress.
• All adversaries between you and the target must succeed on a Reaction Roll (13) or be hit by vines, taking 2d8+2 physical damage.

On a success, vines reach out from your hands, causing the chosen effect and temporarily Restraining the target.

entries.name: HEALING FIELD
entries.description:
Level 4 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Once per long rest, you can conjure a field of healing plants around you. Everywhere within Close range of you bursts to life with vibrant nature, allowing you and all allies in the area to clear 3 Hit Points.

Spend a Hope to allow you and all allies to clear 2 Hit Points instead.

entries.name: THORN SKIN
entries.description:
Level 5 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Once per rest, spend a Hope to sprout thorns all over your body. When you do, place a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait on this card. When you take damage, you can spend any number of tokens to add that number of d4s. And when an adversary deals you melee damage by that amount. If you're within Melee range of the attacker, deal that amount of damage back to them.

When you take a rest, clear all unspent tokens.

entries.name: WILD FORTRESS
entries.description:
Level 5 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success, spend 2 Hope to grow a natural barricade in the shape of a dome that you and your allies can pass through, White creatures within can't be targeted by attacks and can't make attacks. Attacks made against the dome automatically succeed. The dome lasts for a few minutes or until it marks 3 Hit Points. Place tokens on this card to represent marking Hit Points.

Thresholds: 15/30

entries.name: CONJURED STEEDS
entries.description:
Level 6 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend any number of Hope to conjure that many magical steeds (such as horses, camels, or elephants) that you and your allies can ride until your next long rest or the steeds take any damage. The steeds double your land speed while running and can carry extra weight. The steeds double your travel speed to Far range without having to roll. Creatures riding a steed gain a -2 penalty to attack rolls and a +2 bonus to damage rolls.

entries.name: FORAGER
entries.description:
Level 6 Sage Ability
Recall Cost: 1

As an additional downtime move you can choose, roll a d6 to see what you forage. Work with the GM to describe it and add it to your inventory as a consumable. Your party can carry up to three of each foraged item at a time.

1. A unique food (Clear 2 Stress)
2. A beautiful relic (Gain 2 Hope)
3. An arcane rune (+2 to a Spellcast Roll)
4. A healing vial (Clear 2 Hit Points)
5. A magical dust (Clear any d4)
6. Choose one of the options above.

entries.name: SAGE-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Sage Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When 4 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from the Sage domain, gain the following benefits:

• While you're in a natural environment, you gain a +2 bonus to your Instinct Rolls.
• Once per rest, you can double your Agility or Instinct when making a roll that uses that trait. You must choose to do this before you roll.

entries.name: WILD SURGE
entries.description:
Level 7 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Once per long rest, mark a Stress to channel the natural world around you and enhance yourself. Describe how your appearance changes, then place a d6 on this card with the 1 value facing up.

While the Wild Surge Die is active, you add its value to every action roll you make. After you add its value to a roll, increase the Wild Surge Die's value by one. When the die's value would exceed 6 or you take a rest, this form drops and you must mark an additional Stress.

entries.name: FOREST SPRITES
entries.description:
Level 8 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success, spend any number of Hope to create an equal number of small forest sprites who appear at points you choose within Far range, providing the following benefits:

• Your allies gain a +3 bonus to attack rolls against adversaries within Melee range of a sprite.
• An ally who marks an Armor Slot within Melee range of a sprite can mark an additional Armor Slot.

A sprite vanishes after granting a benefit or taking any damage.

entries.name: REJUVENATION BARRIER
entries.description:
Level 8 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend a Hope to conjure a shimmering, semi-translucent barrier of protective energy around you at Very Close range. You and all allies within the barrier when this spell is cast clear 1d4 Hit Points. While the barrier is up, you and all allies within have resistance to physical damage from outside the barrier.

When you move, the barrier follows you.

entries.name: BANE OF THE WILDS
entries.description:
Level 9 Sage Ability
Recall Cost: 2

Once per long rest, place a number of tokens equal to the number of Sage domain cards in your loadout anywhere on this card.

When you would make a Spellcast Roll, you can spend any number of tokens after the roll to gain a +1 bonus for each token spent.

When you critically succeed on a Spellcast Roll for a Sage domain spell, gain a token.

When you take a long rest, clear all unspent tokens.

entries.name: PLANT DOMINION
entries.description:
Level 9 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll (13). Once per long rest on a success, take control of the natural world. Conjure thick undergrowth of plant life anywhere within Far range of you. For example, you can grow trees instantly, clear a path through dense vines, or create a wall of roots.

The effect is permanent.

entries.name: FORCE OF NATURE
entries.description:
Level 10 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Mark a Stress to transform into a hulking nature spirit, gaining the following benefits:

• When you succeed on an attack or Spellcast Roll, gain a +10 bonus to the damage roll.
• When you deal enough damage to defeat a creature within Close range, you absorb them and clear an Armor Slot.
• You can't be Restrained.

Before you make an action roll, you must spend a Hope. If you can't, you revert to your normal form.

entries.name: TEMPEST
entries.description:
Level 10 Sage Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Choose one of the following tempests and make a Spellcast Roll against all targets within Far range. Targets you succeed against experience the effects until the GM spends a Fear on their turn to end the spell.
• Blizzard: Deal 2d20+6 magic damage and targets are temporarily Vulnerable.
• Hurricane: Deal 3d10+10 magic damage and choose a direction the wind is blowing. Targets can't move against the wind.
• Sandstorm: Deal 5d6+9 magic damage. Attacks made from beyond Melee range have disadvantage.

entries.name: BOLT BEACON
entries.description:
Level 1 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll against a target within Far range. On a success, spend a Hope to send a bolt of shimmering energy toward the target that deals 1d6 damage using your Proficiency. The target becomes temporarily Vulnerable and glows brightly until this condition is cleared.

entries.name: MENDING TOUCH
entries.description:
Level 1 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

You lay your hands upon a creature and channel healing magic to close their wounds. When you can take a few minutes to focus on the target, you can spend any amount of Hope to clear a Hit Point or a Stress on them.
Once per long rest, when you spend this healing time learning something new about a creature (including something about yourself), you can clear 2 Hit Points or 2 Stress on them instead.

entries.name: REASSURANCE
entries.description:
Level 1 Splendor Ability
Recall Cost: 0

Once per rest, after an ally attempts an action roll but before the consequences take place, you can offer assistance or words of support. When you do, your ally can reroll their dice.

entries.name: FINAL WORDS
entries.description:
Level 2 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

You can infuse a corpse with a moment of life to speak with it. Make a Spellcast Roll (13). On a success with Hope, the corpse awakens for a few questions. On a success without Hope, it awakens but speaks in riddles or speaks truthfully, but it can't impart information it didn't know in life. On a failure, or once the corpse has finished answering your questions, the body turns to dust.

entries.name: HEALING HANDS
entries.description:
Level 2 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Make a Spellcast Roll (13) and target a creature other than yourself within Melee range. On a success, mark a Stress to clear 2 Hit Points on the target. On a success with Hope, mark a Stress to clear a Hit Point or a Stress on the target. Roll against the same target again until your next long rest.

entries.name: SECOND WIND
entries.description:
Level 3 Splendor Ability
Recall Cost: 2

Once per rest, when you succeed on an attack against an adversary, you can clear 3 Stress or a Hit Point. On a success with Hope, you also clear 3 Stress or a Hit Point on an ally within Close range of you.

entries.name: VOICE OF REASON
entries.description:
Level 3 Splendor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

You speak with an unmatched power and authority. You have advantage on action rolls to de-escalate violent situations or convince others to listen to reason.
Additionally, you're emboldened in moments of duress. When all of your Stress slots are marked, you gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for damage rolls.

entries.name: DIVINATION
entries.description:
Level 4 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Once per long rest, spend 3 Hope to reach out to the forces beyond and ask one "yes or no" question about a recent, present, place, or situation in the near future. For a moment, the present falls away and you see the answer before you.

entries.name: LIFE WARD
entries.description:
Level 4 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend 3 Hope and choose an ally within Close range. They are surrounded by a glowing aura of protection. When this ally would make a death move, they clear a Hit Point instead.
This effect ends when it saves the target from a death move, you cast Life Ward on another target, or you take a long rest.

entries.name: SHAPE MATERIAL
entries.description:
Level 5 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

Spend a Hope to shape a section of natural material you're touching (such as stone, ice, or wood) to suit your purpose. The area of the material can be no larger than you. For example, you can form a rudimentary tool or create a door.
You can only affect the material within Close range of where you're touching it.

entries.name: SMITE
entries.description:
Level 5 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Once per rest, spend 3 Hope to charge your powerful smite. When you next successfully attack with a weapon, double the weapon's damage dice and this is three deals magic damage regardless of the weapon's damage type.

entries.name: RESTORATION
entries.description:
Level 6 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

After you rest, place a number of tokens equal to your Spellcast trait on this card. Touch a creature and spend any number of tokens to clear 2 Hit Points or 2 Stress for each token you spend.
You can also spend a token from this card when touching a creature to clear the Vulnerable condition or heal a physical ailment (such as a missing limb, curse, or disease (tokens depending on the strength of the ailment).
When you take a long rest, clear all unspent tokens.

entries.name: ZONE OF PROTECTION
entries.description:
Level 6 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (16). Once per long rest on a success, choose a point within Far range and create a visible zone of protection there for all allies within Very Close range of that point. When you do, place a d6 on this card with the 1 value facing up. While an ally in this zone takes damage, they reduce the severity by the number showing on the die.
When the die's value would exceed 6, this effect ends.

entries.name: HEALING STRIKE
entries.description:
Level 7 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 1

When you deal damage to an adversary, you can spend 2 Hope to clear a Hit Point on an ally within Close range.

entries.name: SPLENDOR-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Splendor Ability
Recall Cost: 2

When 4 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from the Splendor domain, gain the following benefits:
• +1 bonus to your Severe damage threshold
• Once per long rest, when incoming damage would require you to mark a number of Hit Points, you can choose to mark that much Stress or spend that much Hope instead.

entries.name: SHIELD AURA
entries.description:
Level 8 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Mark a Stress to cast a protective aura on a target within Very Close range. When the target marks an Armor Slot, they reduce the severity of the attack by an additional threshold. If this spell causes a creature who would be damaged to instead mark no Hit Points, the effect ends.
You can only hold Shield Aura on one creature at a time.

entries.name: STUNNING SUNLIGHT
entries.description:
Level 8 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll to unleash powerful rays of burning sunlight against all adversaries at front of you within Far range. On a success, spend 2 Hope to deal 4d6+9 magic damage. Any targets you succeeded against must make a Reaction Roll (14).
Targets who succeed take 3d20+3 magic damage. Targets who fail take 4d20+5 magic damage and are temporarily Stunned. While Stunned, they can't use reactions and can't take any other actions until they clear this condition.

entries.name: OVERWHELMING AURA
entries.description:
Level 9 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (15) to magically empower your aura. On a success, spend 2 Hope to make your Presence equal to your Spellcast trait for this spell.
While this spell is active, an adversary must mark a Stress when they target you with an attack.

entries.name: SALVATION BEAM
entries.description:
Level 9 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (16). On a success, mark any number of Stress to target a line of allies within Far range. You can clear Hit Points on the targets equal to the number of Stress marked, divided among them however you'd like.

entries.name: INVIGORATION
entries.description:
Level 10 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 3

When your or an ally within Close range has used a feature that has an exhaustion limit (such as once per rest or once per long rest), you can spend any number of Hope (up to all four) to refresh that many d8s. If any roll 8, the feature can be used again.

entries.name: RESURRECTION
entries.description:
Level 10 Splendor Spell
Recall Cost: 2

Make a Spellcast Roll (20). On a success, restore one creature who has been dead no longer than 100 years to full strength. Then roll a d6. On a result of 5 or lower, place this card in your vault permanently.
On a failure, you can't cast Resurrection again for a week.

entries.name: BARE BONES
entries.description:
Level 1 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 0

When you're not wearing or equip armor, you have a base Armor Score of 3 + your Strength and use the following as your base damage thresholds:

• Tier 1: 9/19
• Tier 2: 12/24
• Tier 3: 13/31
• Tier 4: 15/36

entries.name: FORCEFUL RUSH
entries.description:
Level 1 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 0

Make an attack with your primary weapon against a target within Melee range. On a success, you deal damage and knock them down. On a success with Hope, also add +2d6 to your damage roll.

Additionally, you can spend a Hope to make them temporarily Vulnerable.

entries.name: I AM YOUR SHIELD
entries.description:
Level 1 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When an ally within Very Close range would take damage, you can mark a Stress to stand in the way and make yourself the target of the attack instead. When you take damage from this attack, you can mark any number of Armor Slots.

entries.name: BODY BASHER
entries.description:
Level 2 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

You use the full force of your body in a fight. On a successful attack with an unarmed weapon with a Melee range, gain a bonus to your damage roll equal to your Strength.

entries.name: BOLD PRESENCE
entries.description:
Level 2 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When you make a Presence Roll, you can spend a Hope to add your Strength to the roll.

Additionally, once per rest when you would gain a condition, you can describe how your bold presence aids you in the situation and avoid gaining the condition.

entries.name: CRITICAL INSPIRATION
entries.description:
Level 3 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Once per rest, when you critically succeed on an attack, all allies within Very Close range can clear a Stress or gain a Hope.

entries.name: LEAN ON ME
entries.description:
Level 3 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Once per long rest, when you console or inspire an ally who failed an action roll, you can both clear 2 Stress.

entries.name: GOAD THEM ON
entries.description:
Level 4 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Once per short rest, when an enemy within Close range, they must make a Presence Roll against them. On a success, the target must mark a Stress, and the next time an ally attacks them, they make that attack with advantage.

entries.name: SUPPORT TANK
entries.description:
Level 4 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 2

When an ally within Close range fails a roll, you can spend 2 Hope to allow them to reroll either their Hope or Fear Die.

entries.name: ARMORER
entries.description:
Level 5 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

While you're wearing armor, gain a +1 bonus to your Armor Score.

During a rest, when you choose to repair your armor as a downtime move, your allies also clear an Armor Slot.

entries.name: ROUSING STRIKE
entries.description:
Level 5 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Once per rest, when you critically succeed on an attack, you and all allies who can see or hear you can clear a Hit Point or 1d4 Stress.

entries.name: INEVITABLE
entries.description:
Level 6 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When you fail an action roll, your next action roll has advantage.

entries.name: RISE UP
entries.description:
Level 6 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 2

Gain a bonus to your Severe threshold equal to your Proficiency.

When you mark 1 or more Hit Points from an attack, clear a Stress.

entries.name: SHRUG IT OFF
entries.description:
Level 7 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When you would take damage, you can mark a Stress to reduce the severity of the damage by one threshold. When you do, roll a d6. On a result of 3 or lower, place this card in your vault permanently.

entries.name: VALOR-TOUCHED
entries.description:
Level 7 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When 5 or more of the domain cards in your loadout are from the Valor domain, gain the following benefits:

• +1 bonus to your Armor Score
• When you mark 1 or more Hit Points without marking an Armor Slot, clear an Armor Slot.

entries.name: FULL SURGE
entries.description:
Level 8 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Once per long rest, mark 3 Stress to push your body to its limits. Gain a +2 bonus to all of your character traits until your next rest.

entries.name: GROUND POUND
entries.description:
Level 8 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 2

Spend 2 Hope to strike the ground where you stand and make a Strength Roll against all targets within Very Close range. Targets you succeed against are thrown back to Far range and must make a Reaction Roll (17). Targets who fail take 4d10+8 damage. Targets who succeed take half damage.

entries.name: HOLD THE LINE
entries.description:
Level 8 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Describe the defensive stance you take and spend a Hope. If an adversary moves within Very Close range, they're pulled into Melee range and Restrained.

This condition lasts until you move or fail a roll with Fear, or the GM spends 2 Fear on their turn to clear it.

entries.name: LEAD BY EXAMPLE
entries.description:
Level 9 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

When you deal damage to an adversary, you can mark a Stress and all allies within Very Close range can encourage yourself. Any ally can make an attack against that adversary can clear a Stress or gain a Hope.

entries.name: UNBREAKABLE
entries.description:
Level 9 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 4

When you mark your last Hit Point, instead of making a death move, roll a number of d6s and clear a number of Hit Points equal to the result. Then place this card in your vault.

entries.name: UNTIRING ARMOR
entries.description:
Level 10 Valor Ability
Recall Cost: 1

Gain a bonus to your Severe threshold equal to your Proficiency.

When you would mark an Armor Slot, roll a number of d6s equal to your Proficiency. If any roll a 6, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.
